data.public_job_desc:
ALL CAPS, NO SPACES B/T UNDERSCORES PTN_US_GBAMSREQID_
Candidate BeelineID i.e. PTN_US_9999999_SKIPJOHNSON0413
MSP Owner: Thomas Hodges
Targeted Bill Rate- $70-$80hr
REQUIREMENT_CITY - Stamford, CT/Remote
REQUIREMENT_ID-10752519
Role Name - IDMC Data Lineage Developer

ROLE_DESCRIPTION -

We are seeking an experienced Informatica IDMC Data Lineage Specialist to support our enterprise data governance and metadata management initiatives. This role will focus on implementing, managing, and optimizing data lineage capabilities using Informatica Intelligent Data Management Cloud (IDMC), Enterprise Data Catalog (EDC), and related tools to ensure data transparency, compliance, and trust across the organization.

Key Responsibilities:

Implement and configure Informatica IDMC data lineage capabilities, including metadata scanning, parsing, linking, and visualization.

Build and maintain end-to-end data lineage maps for critical data assets across multiple systems (e.g., databases, ETL, cloud, BI tools).

Collaborate with Data Governance, Data Engineering, and Business Teams to identify and onboard key metadata sources into Informatica IDMC.

Ensure data lineage accuracy and quality by validating lineage paths, resolving lineage gaps, and documenting transformation logic.

Automate metadata ingestion from source systems like Snowflake, Oracle, SQL Server, Informatica PowerCenter/IICS, Tableau, etc.

Develop custom metadata parsers and lineage connectors if needed, using APIs or Informatica-provided SDKs.

Support data governance, regulatory compliance (e.g., GDPR, HIPAA), and impact analysis through accurate lineage mapping.

Participate in the design and maintenance of metadata management workflows, policies, and lineage standards.

Train and support users on how to access and interpret lineage through the Informatica Data Catalog UI.

Skills: Amazon Web Services Data & Analytics
Experience Required: 6-8, Project Code :

Role Descriptions: - To provide disability case management and claim adjudications| based on medical documentation and the applicable disability plan interpretation| including determining benefits due and making timely payments and adjustments. - Review and analyze medical information (i.e. diagnostic tests| office notes| operative reports| etc.) to determine if the claimant is disabled as defined by the disability plan.- Able to make required outreaches for missing claims documentations to employee| physicians| or employers.- Utilizes the appropriate clinical resources in case assessment (i.e. duration guidelines| in-house clinicians).- Partner with clinical and vocational resources to evaluate disability and support return to work goals.- Analyzes| approves and authorizes assigned claims and determines benefits due pursuant to a short term disability plan.- Communicates clearly with the claimants and clients to set expectations on all aspects of claims process either by phone andor written correspondence.- Reviews client critical deliverables| manages the overall workload| and second-level process escalation.- Determines benefits due| makes timely claims payments and or approvals and adjustments for Workers Compensation| State Short Term Disability| and other disability offsets.- Refers cases as appropriate to team lead and clinical case management.- Responsible for managing the day-to-day workload and first-level process escalation| and reviews processes for accuracy and timeliness where applicable in case of peer reviews.- Provide ideas to management on continuous improvement and service level management.- Performs other duties or participates in special projects as assigned.
Essential Skills: Short Term Disability Case Associate
Desirable Skills:
Keyword:
Skills: Insurance - Disability Claims
Experience Required: 4-6, Project Code :

data.public_job_desc:
Bill Rate: MAX CONFIRMED $60
Location: ONSITE- – Hybrid(3 days onsite[Columbia, SC] and 2 days remote)
Duration: 6 months

Role: Defects Triage Lead

Descriptions:

Key Responsibilities
Defect Triage & Management
Lead daily triage calls for Salesforce and nCino LO platform defects
Analyze defects across modules such as:
Loan origination workflows
Credit approvals
Document management
Integrations (e.g., credit bureaus, core banking systems)
Classify defects by severity, priority, and business impact (loan processing impact)
Ensure defects are reproducible, well-documented, and aligned with business scenarios
Salesforce & nCino Functional Coordination
Partner with nCino product owners and banking SMEs to assess business impact
Work closely with Salesforce developers/admins on defect fixes (Apex, Lightning, Flows, Config)
Understand nCino data model, objects, and lending lifecycle to validate defects
Coordinate defects across integrations, APIs, and middleware layers
Stakeholder Communication
Act as the primary escalation point for critical defects impacting loan processing
Provide continuous updates to business, QA leadership, and release management teams
Drive alignment between technical and functional teams during triage decisions
Quality & Process Improvement
Establish and govern defect triage best practices specific to Salesforce/nCino
Identify recurring issues and drive root cause analysis (RCA)
Recommend improvements in:
Validation rules
Configurations
Data quality
Integration stability
Ensure adherence to release timelines and banking compliance standards


Skills: Digital : Salesforce Service Cloud~Commercial Lending
Experience Required: 10 & Above, Project Code :

**Please strictly adhere to the following resume naming convention:
ALL CAPS, NO SPACES B/T UNDERSCORES
PTN_US_GBAMSREQID_CANDIDATEBEELINEID
i.e. PTN_US_9999999_SKIPJOHNSON0413

Bill Rate $65-$75/hr

MSP Owner: Felix Avalos
Location: Warsaw, IN (hybrid)
Duration: 6 months
GBaMS ReqID: 10775787

Sr. Principal Lead/Architect/Engineer Workload Automation (IBM Tivoli-TWS/IWS)
Role Overview
We are seeking a Lead Workload Automation Engineer / Architect to define and drive the enterprise architecture, strategy, and operational model for IBM Tivoli/IBM Workload Scheduler (TWS/IWS) across distributed environments (on-prem and cloud). This role sets platform standards and reference designs, leads modernization and major upgrades/migrations, governs reliability and security practices, and serves as the senior technical partner for application, databases, and infrastructure organizations to deliver resilient, scalable scheduling services for mission-critical workloads. In addition, assist and supervise two job scheduling teams.



Must Haves
1. Hands on to the end-to-end architecture for the TWS/IWS platform (components, topology, environments, integrations), including standards, patterns, integrations and APIs (REST/SOAP), event-based scheduling, and real-time/on-demand workload patterns.
2. Experience with Tivoli Dynamic Workload Console (TDWC/TDWB) and critical path monitoring and integrating file transfer solutions (e.g., SFTP/PGP/GPG, managed file transfer platforms) into batch workflows.
3. Experience with SAP and other enterprise application integrations via TWS extended agents.
4. Experience building dashboards/metrics and integrating with observability platforms (e.g., Grafana/Graphite).
5. Databases: DB2 (HADR), Oracle/Postgres (familiarity)
6. Experience defining platform standards, leading upgrades/migrations, and coordinating cross-team delivery (e.g., change windows, cutovers, rollback planning).
7. Artificial Intelligence – Navigating all the AI APP – know how to communicate with it and know when not to use it when it does not meet your or the companies’ expectations





Key Responsibilities
• Own the end-to-end architecture for the TWS/IWS platform (components, topology, environments, integrations), including standards, patterns, and reference implementations.
• Provide technical oversight for additional (3rd-party) job scheduling platforms where used; establish operating standards, integration patterns, and support processes to ensure consistent controls and reliability.
• Lead enterprise-scale installations, upgrades, and migrations; define cutover/rollback strategies, coordinate change windows, and ensure readiness across dependent teams.
• Lead assessments of legacy scheduler instances and batch frameworks to identify candidates for retirement, consolidation, or migration; produce target-state recommendations, sequencing/roadmaps, and risk-based migration plans.
• Define reliability engineering practices for workload automation: availability targets, capacity planning, performance tuning, monitoring/alerting, and continuous improvement.
• Design and validate high-availability and disaster recovery solutions (including DB2 HADR where applicable); plan and execute regular DR tests and remediate gaps.
• Establish governance for workload onboarding and job design: scheduling standards, dependency modeling, naming conventions, calendars, critical path optimization, and SLA/SLO management.
• Architect and productionize automation for platform operations and self-service (e.g., provisioning, reporting, batch controls) using shell/Python/Perl and enterprise tooling.
• Own security and compliance posture: access model (LDAP/SSO), least-privilege controls, audit evidence, vulnerability remediation, and secure configuration baselines.
• Manage and develop two teams (e.g., platform engineering and operations): set priorities and operating rhythms, oversee delivery and support outcomes, coach/mentor team members, and drive performance management in partnership with leadership.
• Be available for major outages and critical events related to job scheduling, including QEND activities up to four (4) times per fiscal year, providing incident leadership, stakeholder communications, and post-incident follow-up.
• Participate in an on-call rotation and provide after-hours/weekend support as needed to maintain scheduling availability and meet business SLAs.
• Support a global operating model by working flexibly across EMEA and US business hours to provide required coverage and stakeholder overlap.
• Serve as escalation point for complex incidents; lead root-cause analysis and drive problem management to prevent recurrence.
• Mentor and guide engineers; lead technical design reviews, documentation/runbook standards, and knowledge sharing across the organization.
• Deep dive into other job scheduling teams like Automate, AS400 and Robot and assist in supervising these teams in IT Operations.
Required Qualifications
• High School Diploma or equivalent
• 10+ years of experience in enterprise workload automation, including 7+ years of hands-on IBM TWS/IWS/IWA administration in distributed environments.
• Bachelor’s degree or 10+ years of equivalent IT industry service experience
• For senior/lead equivalent roles, 8+ years of relevant ITSM/major incident operations experience may be required.
• IT Technology Certification is a plus
• Proven experience in a lead/architect capacity: defining platform standards/reference designs, guiding cross-team implementations, and making architecture decisions for reliability, scalability, and security.
• Strong Linux/UNIX engineering and production troubleshooting experience, including performance and availability triage.
• Advanced automation/scripting skills (shell plus Python and/or Perl) with experience building supported, maintainable operational tooling.
• Demonstrated ability to lead complex incident response and root-cause analysis, and to drive preventative action through problem management.
• Strong change leadership in regulated production environments (planning, risk management, implementation, validation, rollback) aligned with ITIL processes.
• Excellent stakeholder communication and ability to influence across applications, database, infrastructure, and security teams.
Preferred Qualifications
• DB2 administration experience, including High Availability Disaster Recovery (HADR); familiarity with Oracle/Postgres and SQL.
• Experience with TWS/IWS integrations and APIs (REST/SOAP), event-based scheduling, and real-time/on-demand workload patterns.
• Experience with Tivoli Dynamic Workload Console (TDWC/TDWB) and critical path monitoring.
• Experience integrating file transfer solutions (e.g., SFTP/PGP/GPG, managed file transfer platforms) into batch workflows.
• Experience with SAP and other enterprise application integrations via TWS extended agents.
• Experience building dashboards/metrics and integrating with observability platforms (e.g., Grafana/Graphite).
• Experience defining platform standards, leading upgrades/migrations, and coordinating cross-team delivery (e.g., change windows, cutovers, rollback planning).
• Familiarity with cloud patterns and automation (e.g., infrastructure-as-code concepts, container/VM scheduling considerations) in support of workload modernization.
• Hands-on experience across ITSM processes (Incident, Problem, Change, Knowledge) in an enterprise environment.
• ServiceNow experience, including incident lifecycle management, documentation standards, and reporting.
• Working knowledge of ITIL concepts and IT service management best practices.
• Artificial Intelligence – Navigating all the AI APP – know how to communicate with it and know when not to use it when it does not meet your or the companies’ expectations
• Strong analytical and problem-solving skills to investigate issues and drive resolution.
• Ability to manage multiple tasks in a high-volume, high-urgency operations environment.
• Strong written and verbal communication skills, including confident facilitation on conference bridges.
• Able to write and review technical documentation and knowledge articles.

Skills & Tools
• Workload Automation: IBM TWS/IWS/IWA, TDWC/TDWB, dynamic scheduling, JSDL
• Operating Systems: Linux, UNIX (AIX/SunOS), Windows (agent support)
• Databases: DB2 (HADR), Oracle/Postgres (familiarity)
• Scripting: Shell, Python, Perl
• ITSM/Monitoring: ITIL processes; integrations with tools such as ServiceNow, AppDynamics, OBM, Grafana/Graphite
• Security: LDAP/SSO concepts, role-based access, audit/patch compliance, Project Code :

• Be available for major outages and critical events related to job scheduling, including QEND activities up to four (4) times per fiscal year, providing incident leadership, stakeholder communications, and post-incident follow-up.
• Participate in an on-call rotation and provide after-hours/weekend support as needed to maintain scheduling availability and meet business SLAs.
• Support a global operating model by working flexibly across EMEA and US business hours to provide required coverage and stakeholder overlap.
• Serve as escalation point for complex incidents; lead root-cause analysis and drive problem management to prevent recurrence.
• Mentor and guide engineers; lead technical design reviews, documentation/runbook standards, and knowledge sharing across the organization.
• Deep dive into other job scheduling teams like Automate, AS400 and Robot and assist in supervising these teams in IT Operations.
Required Qualifications
• High School Diploma or equivalent
• 10+ years of experience in enterprise workload automation, including 7+ years of hands-on IBM TWS/IWS/IWA administration in distributed environments.
• Bachelor’s degree or 10+ years of equivalent IT industry service experience
• For senior/lead equivalent roles, 8+ years of relevant ITSM/major incident operations experience may be required.
• IT Technology Certification is a plus
• Proven experience in a lead/architect capacity: defining platform standards/reference designs, guiding cross-team implementations, and making architecture decisions for reliability, scalability, and security.
• Strong Linux/UNIX engineering and production troubleshooting experience, including performance and availability triage.
• Advanced automation/scripting skills (shell plus Python and/or Perl) with experience building supported, maintainable operational tooling.
• Demonstrated ability to lead complex incident response and root-cause analysis, and to drive preventative action through problem management.
• Strong change leadership in regulated production environments (planning, risk management, implementation, validation, rollback) aligned with ITIL processes.
• Excellent stakeholder communication and ability to influence across applications, database, infrastructure, and security teams.
Preferred Qualifications
• DB2 administration experience, including High Availability Disaster Recovery (HADR); familiarity with Oracle/Postgres and SQL.
• Experience with TWS/IWS integrations and APIs (REST/SOAP), event-based scheduling, and real-time/on-demand workload patterns.
• Experience with Tivoli Dynamic Workload Console (TDWC/TDWB) and critical path monitoring.
• Experience integrating file transfer solutions (e.g., SFTP/PGP/GPG, managed file transfer platforms) into batch workflows.
• Experience with SAP and other enterprise application integrations via TWS extended agents.
• Experience building dashboards/metrics and integrating with observability platforms (e.g., Grafana/Graphite).
• Experience defining platform standards, leading upgrades/migrations, and coordinating cross-team delivery (e.g., change windows, cutovers, rollback planning).
• Familiarity with cloud patterns and automation (e.g., infrastructure-as-code concepts, container/VM scheduling considerations) in support of workload modernization.
• Hands-on experience across ITSM processes (Incident, Problem, Change, Knowledge) in an enterprise environment.
• ServiceNow experience, including incident lifecycle management, documentation standards, and reporting.
• Working knowledge of ITIL concepts and IT service management best practices.
• Artificial Intelligence – Navigating all the AI APP – know how to communicate with it and know when not to use it when it does not meet your or the companies’ expectations
• Strong analytical and problem-solving skills to investigate issues and drive resolution.
• Ability to manage multiple tasks in a high-volume, high-urgency operations environment.
• Strong written and verbal communication skills, including confident facilitation on conference bridges.
• Able to write and review technical documentation and knowledge articles.

Skills & Tools
• Workload Automation: IBM TWS/IWS/IWA, TDWC/TDWB, dynamic scheduling, JSDL
• Operating Systems: Linux, UNIX (AIX/SunOS), Windows (agent support)
• Databases: DB2 (HADR), Oracle/Postgres (familiarity)
• Scripting: Shell, Python, Perl
• ITSM/Monitoring: ITIL processes; integrations with tools such as ServiceNow, AppDynamics, OBM, Grafana/Graphite
• Security: LDAP/SSO concepts, role-based access, audit/patch compliance, Project Code :

MSP Owner: Rob Finton
Location: Memphis, TN - On-Site 100%
Duration: 6 months
GBaMS ReqID: 10769963

STRONG STERLING OMS PROFILES will be considered if Kibo skill is not available. Needs to be able to ramp-up on Kibo quickly.

Competencies: 10+ years experience required
Order and Service Management

Must Have Technical/Functional Skills - Overview
A Techno-Functional OMS Manager to lead the design, implementation, and optimization of AutoZone’s Order Management ecosystem.
The role will focus on enhancing and integrating Kibo OMS, Orderful, and Kibo Drop Ship capabilities, ensuring seamless end-to-end order orchestration and fulfillment processes across enterprise systems.

STRONG STERLING OMS PROFILES will be considered if Kibo skill is not available. Needs to be able to ramp-up on Kibo quickly.

Key Responsibilities:
Functional & System Ownership
• Own and manage AutoZone OMS landscape (Kibo, Orderful, Drop Ship modules)
• Document and enhance current OMS capabilities, workflows, and integrations

MSP Owner: Deepa Narayanan
Bill Rate: $45.00-$50.00
Location: Secaucus, NJ
Duration: 6 Months
GBaMS ReqID: 10589891

100% ONSITE ROLE at Meadowslands Pkwy, Secaucus NJ 07094

2 POSITIONS

Network Engineer with DC experience

Deploy, operate, and maintain front-side, backend, and management networks within on-prem data centers
Perform on-site visits to oversee and support new network buildouts executed by operations teams
Architect and optimize network designs to reduce latency, packet loss, and jitter while increasing scale and performance
Deploy and support new software releases, system upgrades, and security patches for network infrastructure
Maintain deep working knowledge of vendor technologies and platforms, including:
AMD / Pensando
Cisco
Palo Alto
Arista
Design for redundancy, resiliency, and future capacity growth
Develop and maintain network inventory documentation, including network diagrams, cabling schedules, and DCIM
Perform advanced troubleshooting and root cause analysis, coordinating with external vendors and internal stakeholders as needed
Ensure network architecture meets high availability and performance requirements for mission-critical platforms
Monitor network health across global sites
Train and enable on-site L1 support teams
Participate in on-call L2 incident response on an as-needed basis

2. Required Qualifications & Experience

Proposed resources must meet or exceed the following requirements:

Minimum 6 years of experience supporting enterprise and/or cloud network infrastructure
Direct experience with Cisco and Arista products
Experience with Cisco Nexus and Nexus Manager
Hands-on experience with VXLAN/EVPN, BGP, leaf-spine architectures, and traditional data center designs
Experience with RDMA network tuning
Intermediate Linux skills
Experience with Python and/or Ansible for automation
Familiarity with tools such as MAAS and/or Infoblox
Arista ACE Level 3 or higher – Required
Cisco CCNP – Preferred
Experience with non-Ethernet technologies (InfiniBand, ConnectX-5/6) is a plus

3. Skills & Attributes

Ability to produce accurate and simplified network diagrams
Strong communication skills with both technical and executive audiences
Strong analytical and troubleshooting skills
Self-starter comfortable working independently and within teams
Dependable and flexible to support critical operations, Project Code :

ALL CAPS, NO SPACES B/T UNDERSCORES PTN_US_GBAMSREQID_
Candidate BeelineID i.e. PTN_US_9999999_SKIPJOHNSON0413
MSP Owner: Thomas Hodges
Targeted Bill Rate- $100hr
REQUIREMENT_CITY - In or around Columbus, OH
REQUIREMENT_ID-10781552
Role Name - Copilot Trainer

ROLE_DESCRIPTION -

Job Description: Microsoft 365 Copilot Trainer (AI Adoption & Enablement)
Role Title: Copilot Trainer – Microsoft 365 Copilot Enablement | Adoption & ROI Acceleration
Role Summary (What success looks like)
The Copilot Trainer is a functional Copilot expert and adoption practitioner responsible for driving awareness → capability → habit formation → measurable productivity outcomes for Microsoft 365 Copilot across targeted business personas. The trainer will present, demonstrate, and deliver webinars across the full M365 Copilot experience, teach prompting best practices, run persona discovery / day-in-the-life interviews, facilitate design thinking workshops, create lesson plans and hands on labs, run Change Corners, and execute targeted adoption campaigns to maximize usage, satisfaction, and ROI.
This role also requires a strong learning agility to stay current with Microsoft’s rapidly evolving Copilot feature set and incorporate new capabilities into training materials and delivery during the program.

Key Responsibilities
1) Copilot Enablement Delivery (Webinars, Demos, Hands on)
• Deliver high-impact live training (virtual / in-person) across Microsoft 365 Copilot experiences (e.g., Copilot in Teams, Outlook, Word, PowerPoint, Excel, and other supported M365 surfaces).
• Run role-based webinars, feature demonstrations, guided walkthroughs, and hands-on labs that map directly to real work tasks.
• Create and manage recorded training assets for asynchronous consumption (session recordings + quick reference guides).
• Facilitate office hours / clinics to reinforce learning, answer questions, and address user barriers (confidence, trust, relevance, and responsible use).
2) Prompt Writing & “Prompt Coaching” at Scale
• Train users on prompt fundamentals (context, goal, constraints, tone, structure, grounding, iteration).
• Build and maintain a persona-based prompt library and “best prompts” patterns aligned to common workflows.
• Provide “prompt coaching” during labs/clinics to improve quality of outcomes and reduce trial-and-error fatigue.
3) Persona Creation + Day-in-the-Life (DITL) Interviewing
• Lead persona discovery by interviewing business users and managers to understand:
o daily activities, information flows, documents, meetings, decision points, and pain areas
o where Copilot can reduce cycle time, improve quality, or automate drafting/summarization
• Conduct 10–15 structured interviews across roles (or as per program plan) and synthesize insights into role-based scenario maps.
• Translate insights into Top priority use cases and training tracks (focus on what drives real adoption, not generic feature training).
4) Design Thinking Workshops (Use-Case Identification & Workflow Mapping)
• Plan and facilitate design thinking sessions to capture:
o user journeys, workflow steps, “moments that matter,” friction points, and success criteria
• Convert workshop outcomes into:
o a prioritized use-case backlog
o role-based enablement journeys (basic → intermediate → advanced)
o practical labs that replicate daily work tasks
5) Learning Design: Lesson Plans + Persona-Based Paths
• Develop end-to-end lesson plans that include:
o objectives, prerequisite readiness, demo scripts, exercises, expected outcomes, and evaluation rubric
• Create persona-based learning paths for key functions such as:
o Finance, Legal/Compliance, Sales, HR, Operations, Executives (as applicable)
• Maintain reusable assets: slide decks, facilitator guides, learner workbooks, lab guides, Q&A sheets, and troubleshooting tips.
6) Change Corners / Change Kiosks / Community Building
• Run Change Corners (open houses) to enable two-way communication: what’s working, what’s blocked, what users need next.
• Support a champion / change agent network through train-the-trainer enablement, reinforcement content, and recognition mechanisms.
• Build community engagement via the adoption hub and internal channels (Teams/Viva Engage where used).
7) Adoption Campaigns + Communications (Awareness → Habit)
• Design and execute targeted campaigns:
o “Copilot Tips & Tricks” by persona
o “Use-case of the week”
o “Prompt of the week”
o success stories and leader messaging
• Partner with Communications/OCM leads to maintain cadence and reduce change fatigue.
8) Value Realization: ROI & Adoption Measurement Support
• Work with program leads to measure adoption and value:
o cohort ramp-up, attendance, engagement, satisfaction, scenario usage
o qualitative insights + “hours saved” narratives by persona
• Enable and interpret adoption dashboards and reinforce improvements based on trends.
• Drive outcomes aligned to the program’s adoption goals (e.g., scaling MAU, internal trainers certification, measurable ROI dashboards).
9) Train-the-Trainer (TTT) & Capability Transfer
• Lead and certify internal trainers (train-the-trainer model), enabling transition of ownership to client teams (e.g., 30+ certified internal trainers target).
• Provide trainer toolkits: facilitator scripts, demo environments, lab packs, scenario library, and FAQs.
10) Continuous Learning & Feature Velocity Readiness
• Maintain a structured mechanism to:
o track Microsoft Copilot feature updates
o update training materials and labs rapidly
o brief stakeholders on what’s new and how it impacts workflows
• Demonstrate sharp onboarding curve and adapt content during delivery without disrupting cadence.

Required Skills & Competencies
Core Copilot Expertise
• Strong hands-on experience delivering enablement for Microsoft 365 Copilot across major apps and key user scenarios.
• Ability to translate business tasks into Copilot workflows: summarization, drafting, re-writing, analysis, meeting intelligence, email triage, document understanding, and presentation creation.
Training & Facilitation
• Excellent presentation and storytelling ability; confident facilitating large webinars and interactive sessions.
• Adult learning design: lesson planning, learning paths, hands-on labs, assessments.
Discovery & Consulting Skills
• Interviewing and workshop facilitation (persona discovery, DITL, design thinking).
• Ability to synthesize insights into structured outputs: persona maps, scenario library, training backlog.
Change Management & Adoption
• Experience running adoption motions: champion networks, reinforcement loops, nudges, success stories, communication planning.
Data-driven Approach
• Comfort with adoption metrics, survey insights, and value narratives; ability to drive actions based on dashboards and feedback loops.
________________________________________
Qualifications / Experience
• 5+ years in training/facilitation, digital adoption, OCM, or productivity transformation (preferred).
• Demonstrated experience delivering training for Microsoft 365 (Teams/Office apps) and/or AI assistants.
• Certifications (preferred, not mandatory):
o Microsoft fundamentals / Modern Work / Copilot-related badges
o Change management (Prosci/ADKAR) or Design Thinking facilitation (bonus)

Deliverables Owned (What this role produces)
• Persona-based training strategy + learning paths
• Lesson plans + facilitator guides
• Copilot demo scripts and “show me” workflows
• Hands-on lab guides and learner workbooks
• Prompt library + persona scenario bank
• Change Corner runbooks + FAQs
• Targeted campaign content (tips, prompts, newsletters, success stories)
• TTT certification kit and trainer playbook
• Feedback insights and adoption improvement recommendations

Success Metrics / KPIs (Examples)
• Enablement coverage: # webinars, # learners trained, completion rates
• Adoption improvement: weekly/monthly active usage movement in target cohorts (tracked via dashboards)
• Capability transfer: # internal trainers certified (e.g., 30+)
• Scenario adoption: # validated persona scenarios in use
• Business outcomes: documented time savings / productivity gains + executive-ready value stories (and where available, ROI dashboards)
• Satisfaction: post-session CSAT, confidence uplift, reduced “how do I start” tickets

Nice-to-Have (Differentiators)
• Experience in regulated industries (insurance/financial services) and compliance-sensitive communication
• Familiarity with Copilot extensibility concepts (plugins/agents) at a functional level (not a developer requirement)
• Experience running enterprise communities (Viva Engage/Teams) and adoption hubs

Working Model / Stakeholders
• Works closely with: Program Lead / AI Office, Communications Lead, Security/Governance, and business SMEs.
• Supports joint operating cadence with the broader “one AI team” model where Copilot adoption is run in parallel with technical readiness.


Skills: Office 365 Administration~AI & Gen AI - Products & Tools
Experience Required: 10 & Above, Project Code :

• Demonstrated experience delivering training for Microsoft 365 (Teams/Office apps) and/or AI assistants.
• Certifications (preferred, not mandatory):
o Microsoft fundamentals / Modern Work / Copilot-related badges
o Change management (Prosci/ADKAR) or Design Thinking facilitation (bonus)

Deliverables Owned (What this role produces)
• Persona-based training strategy + learning paths
• Lesson plans + facilitator guides
• Copilot demo scripts and “show me” workflows
• Hands-on lab guides and learner workbooks
• Prompt library + persona scenario bank
• Change Corner runbooks + FAQs
• Targeted campaign content (tips, prompts, newsletters, success stories)
• TTT certification kit and trainer playbook
• Feedback insights and adoption improvement recommendations

Success Metrics / KPIs (Examples)
• Enablement coverage: # webinars, # learners trained, completion rates
• Adoption improvement: weekly/monthly active usage movement in target cohorts (tracked via dashboards)
• Capability transfer: # internal trainers certified (e.g., 30+)
• Scenario adoption: # validated persona scenarios in use
• Business outcomes: documented time savings / productivity gains + executive-ready value stories (and where available, ROI dashboards)
• Satisfaction: post-session CSAT, confidence uplift, reduced “how do I start” tickets

Nice-to-Have (Differentiators)
• Experience in regulated industries (insurance/financial services) and compliance-sensitive communication
• Familiarity with Copilot extensibility concepts (plugins/agents) at a functional level (not a developer requirement)
• Experience running enterprise communities (Viva Engage/Teams) and adoption hubs

Working Model / Stakeholders
• Works closely with: Program Lead / AI Office, Communications Lead, Security/Governance, and business SMEs.
• Supports joint operating cadence with the broader “one AI team” model where Copilot adoption is run in parallel with technical readiness.


Skills: Office 365 Administration~AI & Gen AI - Products & Tools
Experience Required: 10 & Above, Project Code :

data.public_job_desc:
Bill Rate: MAX CONFIRMED $70
Location: ONSITE- : Minneapolis, MN **LOCAL PROFILES ONLY**
Duration: 6 months

Role: AWS Cloud Engineer

Descriptions:

AWS Cloud Engineer Job Summary:

We are seeking a Senior AWS Cloud Engineer with deep hands-on experience in architecting, implementing, and migrating large-scale data solutions on AWS. This role focuses on on-premises to AWS data migration, large data storage architectures, and enterprise-grade data transfer solutions using AWS DataSync, S3 replication, and related AWS services. The ideal candidate will lead technical design, implementation, and optimization efforts while working closely with architecture, infrastructure, and security teams.

Key Responsibilities

Design and implement scalable, secure, and cost-optimized AWS data storage architectures for large datasets.
Configure and manage AWS services including EC2, S3, RDS, Lambda, VPC, IAM, Route 53, DataSync, S3 Replication, SageMaker, Glue, ELB, FSx, ECR, and Secrets Manager.
Lead on-premises to AWS cloud data migration initiatives, including planning, execution, validation, and cutover.
Architect and configure AWS DataSync for high-volume, reliable data transfers between on-prem systems and AWS.
Implement and manage Amazon S3 replication (CRR/SRR), lifecycle policies, encryption, and access controls.
Design and develop machine learning models using AWS SageMaker, integrated with Jupyter Notebook, to enable scalable model training, evaluation, and deployment.
Design solutions for large data ingestion, archival, backup, and disaster recovery using AWS services.
Perform hands-on implementation of AWS infrastructure using best practices and Infrastructure as Code (IaC).
Implement CI/CD pipelines using Jenkins or similar tools.
Optimize data transfer performance, storage costs, and data durability.
Collaborate with application, database, network, and security teams to ensure seamless integrations.
Troubleshoot and resolve complex data migration and storage issues.
Enforce AWS security, governance, and compliance standards for data protection.
Required Qualifications

7+ years of experience in cloud engineering, with at least 4+ years of hands-on AWS experience.
Strong hands-on experience with:
AWS DataSync
Amazon S3 (replication, lifecycle policies, versioning, encryption)
AWS SageMaker
Large-scale data storage and migration
Proven experience migrating terabytes to petabytes of data from on-premises environments to AWS.
Strong understanding of networking concepts (VPN, Direct Connect, bandwidth optimization).
Experience designing high-availability, fault-tolerant cloud architectures.
Hands-on experience with Infrastructure as Code (CloudFormation, Terraform, or equivalent).
Solid understanding of IAM, encryption (KMS), and AWS security best practices.
Ability to architect solutions, not just operate them.

Skills: AWS DevOps and Automation
Experience Required: 6-8, Project Code :

data.public_job_desc:
Bill Rate: MAX CONFIRMED $65
MSP Owner: Mya Riecke
Location: Remote 
Duration: 6 months
GBaMS ReqID: 10561550


Role: Business Analyst with Payment exp


Descriptions:
"• This position leads system analysis efforts, delivers strategic insight, and acts as a technical expert for
business systems within the Bank
• Performs at the highest level of service complexity in support of system operations, performance, and usage
• Develops advanced solutions and specifications to resolve process issues, which may involve elements
of testing and development
• Serves as a resource to wider business units or associates and may provide a leadership role for less
experienced analysts
• This role will interface with business, other application development teams within IT as well as various
shared services organizations and infrastructure areas
• Position will be part of Foreign Exchange, supporting continued build out of investments, capital markets,
cash, and liquidity management capabilities at First Citizens Bank
• Data Analysis - Sources, compiles, and interprets data
• Performs data analysis at the most advanced level, effectively communicating and directing analysis output
• May handle special projects or direct the analysis efforts of the work group
• Identifying Requirements - Determines system requirements and communicates them using specifications,
reports, project plans, or other forms of documentation
• Determines and resolves complex factors that affect system processes
• Ensures compliance through monitoring and analysis
• Reporting - Enables strategic insight into business systems through reports to senior management
• Evaluates systems based on data analysis, user input, and extensive testing
• Conveys patterns, problems, and areas of improvement, and develops process enhancements based on results
• System Support - Provides expert technical support for systems by responding to inquiries, ensuring processes
run smoothly, and working to continuously improve the end-user experience
• Handles escalated and complex support issues
• Develops and implements modifications and enhancements
• Serves as an analytics resource to wider organization or business units, offering expertise on systems and
data output
• Lead engagement with business partners on changing business needs, analyze business requirements,
and communicate the system implications of proposed system changes
• Manage and coordinate the initial assessment, analysis, requirements, development, testing and
implementation of incremental enhancements/change requests and other minor releases
• Responsible for serving as a liaison with the business owners to lead and facilitate the elicitation and
prioritization of business initiatives and business requirements including but not limited to 3rd party
vendor interface design, user interface specifications and report design
• Convert application designs into data model and interface/data mapping specifications
• Work closely with developers to understand data structures, data sources and systematic processes
during system development
• Proactively and continuously look for systematic and data integrity issues across multiple systems to
prioritize and fix
• Manage and provide support for system production issues, change requests and maintenance
• Must be able to work in phases of systems analysis and data analysis
• Communicates status, prioritizes requirements, influences and obtains approval for requirement
documentation
• Will be expected to guide and recommend process and system solutions to business owners
• i)experience as a Business Analyst in banking, payments, or fintech
• (ii)Hands-on experience with Real-Time Payments (RTP) platforms - e.g., The Clearing House RTP,
FedNow, or similar
• (vi)Strong analytical, problem-solving, and documentation skills
• (vii)Familiarity with Agile/Scrum methodologies
• (i)Experience with payment gateway integration, banking APIs, or core banking systems
• (iii)Experience with tools like JIRA, Confluence, Visio, or Lucidchart
• (iv)Certification in CBAP, CSPO, or related Agile certifications
Responsibilities
• The ideal candidate will have strong experience in payments systems, especially RTP platforms, and
will serve as the bridge between business stakeholders and technology teams to ensure delivery of
high-impact payment features and enhancements
• (iii)Strong understanding of payment processing, settlements, ACH, wire, and ISO 20022 messaging formats
• (iv)Experience in creating BRDs, FRDs, user stories, and process flow diagrams
• (v)Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills
• (ii)Knowledge of fraud monitoring, AML compliance, or risk mitigation in payments
"
"• Experience as a Business Analyst in banking, payments, or fintech
• Hands-on experience with Real-Time Payments (RTP) platforms - e.g., The Clearing House RTP, FedNow, or similar
• Strong analytical, problem-solving, and documentation skills
• Familiarity with Agile/Scrum methodologies
• Experience with payment gateway integration, banking APIs, or core banking systems
• Experience with tools like JIRA, Confluence, Visio, or Lucidchart."


Skills: Business Analysis
Experience Required: 8-10, Project Code :

data.public_job_desc:
LOCAL to Lewisville, TX, Detroit MI, Charlotte ONLY!

Job Description We're looking for a highly skilled Senior Data Scientist with technical expertise and GenAI knowledge for our Auto Consumer Strategy & Analytics group. This candidate will be responsible for supporting initiatives across machine learning and AI model development, model governance, and emerging generative AI innovations. This candidate will also partner with business stakeholders, technology teams, and risk partners to deliver high-quality ML/AI solutions and tools, and ensure responsible, effective deployment of AI solutions. Successful candidates should have hands-on experience with data and modeling, while demonstrating strong communication skills and the ability to influence a complex organization. The Work Itself In this role, you will lead the development and deployment of cutting-edge machine learning and generative AI/agent solutions that drive business transformation. You will design and implement advanced models utilizing experimentation, multi-modal data, and the latest AI techniques to solve complex problems and unlock new opportunities. As a technical expert and innovator, you will collaborate closely with cross-functional teams to ensure our ML/AI systems are robust, responsible, and deliver measurable impact. You will also lead the architectural design and development of state-of-the-art machine learning, generative AI, and agent systems that enhance user experience, drive revenue, and ensure operational excellence. Key Responsibilities • Develop/Implement/Test AI solutions for the Consumer Auto organization, including supporting vendor-developed Agentic AI models and its governance • Leverage novel approaches to continuously improve model performance and business outcomes • Advance responsible AI practices by integrating governance, ethical considerations, and security into every stage of model development and deployment • Develop and maintain trustworthy benchmarks and operational performance monitoring for predictive models and GenAI and agentic systems • Identify and champion new business opportunities by proposing and delivering innovative AI-driven solutions that create tangible value and competitive advantage. The Skills You Bring Ally Proprietary Ally Proprietary • Bachelor’s Degree in Quantitative/Technical Discipline (Mathematics, Computer Science, Data Science/Analytics, Economics) • Minimum 3 years of data science / quantitative modeling work experience, with hands on experience working with large datasets (including text); practical experience with deploying LLMs highly preferred • Deep expertise in statistics and exploratory data analysis (EDA), paired with the ability to establish trustworthy benchmarks and operational performance monitoring for deployed models • Strong knowledge in programming languages of Python, SQL or R • Solid written and verbal communication skills, including the ability to effectively present data analytics results to internal and external stakeholders • Highly self-motivated and adaptable, with a proven ability to deliver high-quality results in a fast-paced, rapidly evolving environment Preferred Qualifications • Proven experience designing and implementing predictive models, Generative AI, and agentic systems, with a track record of developing novel AI approaches to boost model performance • Strong foundational knowledge of responsible AI practices, including the integration of data governance, ethical AI considerations, and security protocols throughout the model-development lifecycles • Experience with GitHub and repositories • Master's degree or higher in a quantitative field
Roles & Responsibilities

Key Responsibilities • Develop/Implement/Test AI solutions for the Consumer Auto organization, including supporting vendor-developed Agentic AI models and its governance • Leverage novel approaches to continuously improve model performance and business outcomes • Advance responsible AI practices by integrating governance, ethical considerations, and security into every stage of model development and deployment • Develop and maintain trustworthy benchmarks and operational performance monitoring for predictive models and GenAI and agentic systems • Identify and champion new business opportunities by proposing and delivering innovative AI-driven solutions that create tangible value and competitive advantage.

MSP Owner: Will Bristol
Location: ~IRVING, TX~
Duration: 6 months
GBaMS ReqID: 10774736


Role Descriptions: Job Summary

We are looking for a Quality Engineer with hands-on experience in test automation, SQL, and end-to-end testing across backend and UI layers. The ideal candidate is detail-oriented, proactive in identifying quality gaps, and comfortable working in fast-paced Agile environments.


Key Responsibilities

· Design, develop, and maintain automated test scripts using Playwright with Python.

· Perform UI, backend, and API testing to ensure system reliability, functionality, and performance.

· Write and execute complex SQL queries for data validation, troubleshooting, and test verification.

· Validate data pipelines and ETL processes to ensure data accuracy, completeness, and integrity.

· Collaborate with developers, product managers, and data engineers to understand requirements and define test strategies.

· Identify, document, and track defects; work closely with teams to ensure timely resolution.

· Participate in test planning, test case design, and code reviews.

· Ensure high test coverage, reusability, and maintainability of automation frameworks.

Required Skills & Qualifications

· 4+ years of experience in software quality engineering or testing.

· Strong hands-on experience with Python-based test automation using Playwright.

· Experience with UI automation tools, preferably Playwright with Python.

· Solid experience in API/backend testing, including REST APIs and tools such as Postman or similar.

· Proficiency in SQL for data validation and analysis.

· Hands-on experience testing data pipelines and ETL processes.

· Good understanding of software testing methodologies, SDLC, and Agile practices.

· Experience working in Microsoft Azure environments, such as Azure Data Factory, Azure SQL, or similar services.

· Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.

· Exposure to Databricks is preferred.

Essential Skills: Quality Engineer (Playwright with Python)
Desirable Skills:
Keyword:
Skills: Digital : Python~Playwright
Experience Required: 8-10, Project Code :

i.e. PTN_US_9999999_SKIPJOHNSON0413

MSP Owner: Rob Finton
Location: Springfield, MO
Duration: 6 months
GBaMS ReqID: 10502044

Competencies: 6-8+ years experience
Digital : Site Reliability Engineering (SRE)
IBM Websphere
WCS developer/Sr developer skills

Must have: Web Commerce Application Support experience
Experience in supporting(L2) eCommerce platform (WCS 8.x) and enterprise applications.
Experience in order processing, payment gateway integration, batch job monitoring, and performance optimization.

Role Description: Job Summary
We are seeking an experienced L2 Application Support Engineer to provide operational support for our mission-critical WebSphere Commerce Suite (WCS) 8.x e-commerce platform.
This role requires strong troubleshooting skills, proactive monitoring and incident response capabilities to ensure optimal performance and availability of our online commerce systems.

Required Qualifications
Technical Skills

3-5 years of experience in application support or technical support roles
2 years hands-on experience with WebSphere Commerce Suite (WCS) 8.x or similar e-commerce platforms
Experience with database technologies (DB2, Oracle, SQL Server) and basic SQL skills
Basic knowledge of LinuxUnix systems and command line operations
Knowledge of web technologies (HTTPHTTPS, load balancers, web servers)
Experience with monitoring tools such as AppDynamics, Dynatrace or similar APM solutions

Application Support Experience

Proven experience troubleshooting e-commerce application issues including but not limited to

Order processing and payment gateway failures
Shopping cart and session management problems
Product catalog and inventory synchronization issues
Cache invalidation and performance optimization

Experience with scheduled job monitoring and batch process management
Knowledge of feed file processing and data integration workflows
Understanding of multi-tier application architectures and component interactions

Operational Skills

Experience with incident response and issue resolution
Knowledge of ITIL processes including incident, problem, and change management
Ability to work in 24x7 shift-based support environment
Experience with escalation procedures and vendor support coordination

Key Responsibilities
Incident Response Troubleshooting

Respond to production incidents and alerts within defined SLA timeframes
Perform initial analysis for application performance and functionality issues
Troubleshoot order processing failures, payment gateway issues, and checkout problems
Investigate and resolve cache-related issues affecting product data and pricing
Analyze application logs to identify patterns and resolve recurring issues
Coordinate incident response activities and communicate status to stakeholders

Monitoring Performance Management

Monitor WCS application health using monitoring tools (AppDynamics, Dynatrace, Nagios, etc.)
Track key performance metrics including response times, throughput, and error rates
Respond to capacity and performance alerts during peak traffic periods
Monitor scheduled jobs and batch processes for completion and performance
Perform proactive health checks and system validation procedures

Application Operations

Execute service restart and recovery procedures for WCS components
Perform cache invalidation and product data refresh operations
Monitor and troubleshoot feed file processing and data integration workflows
Manage WCS scheduler and batch job, Project Code :
data.skills: Digital : Site Reliability Engineering (SRE), IBM Websphere

Skills: Advanced Java Concepts, Digital : Angular 9
Experience Required: 10 & Above

Role Descriptions:

Technical/Functional Skills
• Minimum 8-10 years of experience in JDK 8 and JDK21 , Springs 3.x, Hibernate 4.0, JPA 2.0
• Good knowledge on JBoss and RichFaces (JSF component framework)
• Good knowledge of Springboot and Angular 8.0/8+, jQuery, Ajax,Bootstrap
• Strong UI architecture (Angular/React) knowledge.
• Strong experience working in Agile framework
• Good knowledge of Microservices based architecture
• Strong Experience working on large volume databases, PLSQL, Stored Procedure.
• Working knowledge of JMS and JBoss Messaging, Active MQ.
• Deep expertise in Object Oriented analysis and design, UML modeling, Classic design patterns and J2EE patterns.
• Strong knowledge of SonarQube, Junit and other testing framework.
• Experience with REST Web Services.
• Need to have excellent communication skills (including English conversation skills), demonstrate excellent problem solving and critical thinking skills
• Well proven skills in data analysis and ability to relate data to business processes
• Experience in working with Version Control Tools like Github, etc.
• Hands On Experience in CICD tools like Jenkins, Liquibase, etc
• Experience working in complex projects with multi-tier architecture.
• Some experience in using AI (Co-Pilot) for actual development.

Experience Required 10+

Roles & Responsibilities
· Software design and development.
· Code review.
· Liaising with team members, management, and clients to ensure projects are completed to standard.
· Identifying risks and forming contingency plans as soon as possible.
· Analyzing existing operations and scheduling training sessions and meetings to discuss improvements.
· Keeping up to date with industry trends and developments (latest technology stack).
· Updating work schedules and performing troubleshooting as required.
· Manage team metrics and work with the Jira administration team to define any customizations needed in support of those metrics.
· Motivating staff and creating a space where they can ask questions and voice their concerns.
· Being transparent with the team about challenges, failures, and successes.
· Writing progress reports and delivering presentations to the relevant

stakeholders.
· Conduct Code reviews and provide suggestions to the team
· Help team to manage Git repository and plan Deploy activities
· Identify recurring issues/alerts and conduct root cause analysis

Education: Bachelor's degree, Project Code :

GBaMS ReqID: 10777545


Role Descriptions: Technical/Functional Skills :
· Strong expertise in Python and AI/ML frameworks
· Hands-on experience with Generative AI and LLMs (Azure OpenAI, prompt engineering, RAG)
· Experience in Intelligent Automation / RPA tools · Strong knowledge of AI-driven workflow orchestration and agent-based automation
· Experience in API development, microservices architecture, and system integrations
· Expertise in data pipelines, ETL processes, and structured/unstructured data processing
· Experience with Azure cloud platform (AI services, app services, data services)
· Familiarity with MLOps / LLMOps frameworks (model deployment, monitoring, lifecycle management)
· Strong understanding of SDLC, Agile delivery, and DevOps practices
· Domain exposure to life sciences/pharma processes (clinical, medical, patient services preferred)
· Strong stakeholder management, solutioning, and leadership skills

Roles & Responsibilities : · Lead design and implementation of AI and automation solutions across Lilly business functions (medical, clinical, commercial) · Architect and build LLM-powered applications, AI agents, and intelligent automation frameworks · Drive end-to-end solution delivery (requirements, design, build, testing, deployment, scaling) · Lead PoCs, pilots, and enterprise-scale rollouts of AI/automation initiatives · Define and implement best practices for AI architecture, MLOps, and reusable accelerators · Collaborate with business stakeholders, SMEs, and IT teams to identify transformation opportunities · Ensure solutions meet quality, performance, security, and compliance standards (GxP, HIPAA) · Support client interactions, solution demos, and executive-level discussions

Nice to have Skills : · Experience in pharma-specific AI use cases (medical information, adverse event processing, protocol digitization) · Exposure to Adobe (AEM/AJO), Salesforce Marketing Cloud, other platforms · Knowledge of vector databases, knowledge graphs, and semantic search · Experience with CI/CD pipelines, Docker, Kubernetes · Understanding of AI governance, explainability, and validation frameworks · Experience in process mining and workflow optimization · Ability to create dashboards, insights, and executive reporting (Power BI or similar)

Education : · Bachelor’s degree in computer science, Engineering, or equivalent experience

Desirable Skills:
Keyword:
Skills: Data Warehouse
Experience Required: 4-6, Project Code :

Note- Candidate must have exp in-
1. Telecom Exp is MUST
2. IBM Netcool - Tivoli NOI, AI Ops
___________________________________________________________________________
Netcool Developer with AIOps Cloud Pak

Role Descriptions: A Netcool Developer with AIOps Cloud Pak expertise is responsible for integrating and migrating traditional IBM Netcool Operations Insight (NOI) event management systems with the AI-powered capabilities of the IBM Cloud Pak for AIOps platform.

The role involves automating IT operations| reducing alert noise| and using AIML to predict and resolve incidents faster.
Key Responsibilities-
Integration and Migration Connecting existing on-premises Netcool Omnibus and Netcool Impact environments with IBM Cloud Pak for AIOps using provided connectors. This includes migrating existing event filters and runbook automation policies.
Event and Data Management Ensuring seamless bidirectional synchronization of event data between Netcool and the AIOps platform.
This involves configuring data mapping and transformation rules (often using JSONATA) for consistent alert and event processing across systems.
Automation Development Creating and implementing automation policies and runbooks (often using Netcool Impact policies and potentially Python Bash scripts) within the AIOps environment to automatically diagnose and remediate IT issues.AI Model Training and Management.
Assisting in feeding quality data to the AIOps platforms machine learning models to enable event grouping| log anomaly detection| metric anomaly detection| and change risk assessment.
Topology and Visualization Utilizing the AIOps platforms resource management and topology features to provide a unified| application-centric view of the IT infrastructure| helping to understand interdependencies and the potential impact of incidents.
Collaboration and Support Working with cross-functional teams (DevOps| SREs| etc.) to integrate data from various third-party tools (Splunk| ServiceNow| Slack| etc.) and ensure a cohesive| AI-driven operations platform.
Troubleshooting Diagnosing and resolving complex issues that arise during the integration and operation of the AIOps and Netcool systems in a hybrid cloud environment.

Required Skills- Expertise in IBM Netcool Suite In-depth knowledge of Netcool Omnibus| Netcool Impact| and their associated tools like probes| gateways| and the Web GUI, Project Code :

Ensure the Agile Release Train (ART) stays on course by facilitating its events and processes and assisting the teams in delivering value and driving relentless improvement. Typically| a servant leader who acts as Chief Scrum Master and coach for the ART
Demonstrable experience of Scrum Management.
Ability to engage and manage relationships with various stakeholders| including product owners| team members| and external partners.
Assist with economic decision-making by facilitating team features and capability estimation and roll-up to the value stream and portfolio level
Experience in Agile tools like JIRA| Confluence.
Good skills to coach team how to follow agile scrum process.
Basic understanding of software development processes| Agile engineering practices| DevOps etc.
Knowledge of Agile methodology: User Story management| Continuous Integration| Continuous Testing| tasks and capacity planning etc.
Strong ability to facilitate meetings| workshops| and ceremonies (e.g.| Sprint Planning| Daily Stand-ups| Sprint Reviews| and Retrospectives).Ability to foresee upcoming risks| impediments and guide the Scrum Team to achieve the resolution.
Ability to analyze and report on team performance metrics (e.g.| velocity| burndown charts) and use data to drive improvements.
Ability to take and understand commitment to deliver the product on time.
Scrum Master certification is preferred.
GxP experience is required
Experience in Life Sciences/CPG industry
Manage the scrum process by coordinating with the Scrum Team as well as with the other Scrum Masters and be flexible to participate in-person / onsite scrum events (minimum 3 days per week).
Be detailed| oriented and organized to keep the squad on track with deliverables at the same time be able to foresee upcoming risks| impediments that could impact delivery and help the squad navigate through it.
Able to adapt Agile practices with Customers Ways of Working| especially with GXP validated systems.
Facilitate Scrum events (Sprint Planning| Daily Stand-ups| Sprint Reviews| and Sprint Retrospectives) to ensure they are productive and time boxed.
Help the team to reach consensus during discussions and facilitate decision-making.
Promote the adoption of Agile best practices and help the team embrace a mindset of learning| collaboration and experimentation.
Track the teams progress and performance through metrics (e.g.| velocity| burn-down charts) and ensure transparency in reporting.
Manage the product backlog and refine user stories.
Create useful| reliable and practical plans for the project and perform capacity planning.
Coach team members on Agile practices and help them grow in their roles.
Encourage a culture of continuous improvement by facilitating Sprint Retrospectives and help the team to identify areas for improvement.
Address conflicts within the team and
Essential Skills: Scrum Master
Desirable Skills:
Keyword:
Skills: Agile Specialisation~Project Management
Experience Required: 8-10, Project Code :

Role Descriptions: Job Description : The Delphi multi-tiered Desktop Application Developer supports the clients mission by developing quality software within a structured and mature software development life-cycle environment| preferably an agile development environment.This position works closely with the customer and team members| especially the Functional Analyst| SQA (Software Quality Assurance)| and other developers to ensure that modifications and enhancements to existing software and development of new software products provide efficient and effective solutions for the customer.The applicant for this position will be involved in all aspects of application development| including analysis| requirements documentation| design| development and test site deployment and issue tracking and resolution.Roles and Responsibilities :Designing| developing| testing| deploying software.Defect resolution and issue tracking.Development of new functionality and modification to existing applications.Participating in agile development life cycle to include daily scrum calls| sprint planning and build planning.Assisting and working with other Delphi developers as well as Mumps developers.Work in Jira to track and update status on work activities. Qualifications:Should have 10+ years of strong experience in Software Development in Delphi.Should be an expert in Delphi development and Technical Analysis Documentation.Ability to effectively resolve performance/memory leak/scalability issues.Develops| enhances| and maintains Pension and Retirement applications using Delphi| Cobol| MS SQL and Btrieve files.Excellent understanding of any RDBMS like Oracle or SQL Server.Strong results orientation| excellent verbal| and written communication skills.Should be capable of handling product versions| documentation| and development standards.Participates in the analysis and design of the clients system applications.Ability to understand code in Delphi 7 and convert to 64-Bit Delphi XE8.Good technical| analytical and communication skills.Strong expertise in application development using Delphi| Interbase and SQL Server.Strong knowledge of COM| ODBC| OOPS concepts and XML.Sound experience on developing Client Server applications and libraries.Expertise on PLSQL| RDBMS concepts and development using relational databases.Work from Office : Maryland| 3 days in a week.
Essential Skills: Delphi Developer

Skills: Delphi
Experience Required: 10 & Above

Job Description : The Delphi multi-tiered Desktop Application Developer supports the client’s mission by developing quality software within a structured and mature software development life-cycle environment, preferably an agile development environment.
This position works closely with the customer and team members, especially the Functional Analyst, SQA (Software Quality Assurance), and other developers to ensure that modifications and enhancements to existing software and development of new software products provide efficient and effective solutions for the customer.
The applicant for this position will be involved in all aspects of application development, including analysis, requirements documentation, design, development and test site deployment and issue tracking and resolution.
Roles and Responsibilities :
• Designing, developing, testing, deploying software.
• Defect resolution and issue tracking.
• Development of new functionality and modification to existing applications.
• Participating in agile development life cycle to include daily scrum calls, sprint planning and build planning.
• Assisting and working with other Delphi developers as well as Mumps developers.
• Work in Jira to track and update status on work activities.

Qualifications:
• Should have 10+ years of strong experience in Software Development in Delphi.
• Should be an expert in Delphi development and Technical Analysis Documentation.
• Ability to effectively resolve performance/memory leak/scalability issues.
• Develops, enhances, and maintains Pension and Retirement applications using Delphi, Cobol, MS SQL and Btrieve files.
• Excellent understanding of any RDBMS like Oracle or SQL Server.
• Strong results orientation, excellent verbal, and written communication skills.
• Should be capable of handling product versions, documentation, and development standards.
• Participates in the analysis and design of the client's system applications.
• Ability to understand code in Delphi 7 and convert to 64-Bit Delphi XE8.
• Good technical, analytical and communication skills.
• Strong expertise in application development using Delphi, Interbase and SQL Server.
• Strong knowledge of COM, ODBC, OOPS concepts and XML.
• Sound experience on developing Client Server applications and libraries.
• Expertise on PLSQL, RDBMS concepts and development using relational databases., Project Code :

REQUIREMENT_ID-10774942
Role Name - .Net Full Stack

ROLE_DESCRIPTION -

Role Overview

We are seeking a skilled .NET Full Stack Developer to design, develop, and maintain scalable web applications. The ideal candidate will have expertise in backend development using .NET technologies and frontend frameworks, along with experience in building end-to-end solutions.

Key Responsibilities

Backend Development

Design and develop robust, scalable, and secure backend services using .NET Core / ASP.NET Core
Build RESTful APIs and microservices
Implement authentication and authorization (JWT, OAuth)
Optimize application performance, scalability, and reliability
Integrate with databases (SQL Server, Azure SQL, or NoSQL solutions)
Frontend Development

Develop responsive user interfaces using Angular / React / Vue.js
Collaborate with UI/UX designers to implement modern designs
Ensure cross-browser compatibility and responsiveness
Consume APIs and handle client-side logic
Full Stack & Integration

Work across the entire application stack
Integrate third-party APIs and services
Ensure seamless communication between front-end and back-end systems
Development & Testing

Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
Perform unit testing, integration testing, and debugging
Participate in code reviews and follow coding standards
Use version control systems like Git
DevOps & Deployment

Deploy applications on Azure / AWS / On-Premises environments
Use CI/CD pipelines (Azure DevOps, GitHub Actions)
Monitor application health and troubleshoot issues

Skills: MySQL~Core Java
Experience Required: 8-10, Project Code :

Role Name - QA Automation Engineer

ROLE_DESCRIPTION -

Role Overview

We are seeking a highly skilled QA Automation Engineer with strong Capital Markets domain knowledge to ensure the quality, reliability, and performance of trading and financial systems. The ideal candidate will bring expertise in test automation (preferably Playwright) and deep understanding of capital markets workflows, instruments, and regulations.



Key Responsibilities

QA & Test Automation

Design, develop, and maintain automated test frameworks using Playwright (preferred) & (Selenium, Cypress)
Develop automated test scripts for UI, API, and end-to-end testing
Integrate automated tests into CI/CD pipelines
Ensure high test coverage and maintain test data management
Capital Markets Domain

Understand and validate workflows related to:
Equities, Fixed Income, Derivatives
Trade lifecycle (Order → Execution → Settlement)
Market data, pricing, and risk calculations
Collaborate with business analysts and stakeholders to ensure requirements are accurately tested
Validate front-office, middle-office, and back-office systems
API & Backend Testing

Perform API testing using tools like Postman, REST Assured
Validate data integrity across microservices and databases
Work with messaging systems (Kafka, MQ) where applicable
Quality Assurance & Testing

Create detailed test plans, test cases, and test scenarios
Perform functional, regression, integration, and performance testing
Identify, log, and track defects using tools like JIRA / Azure DevOps
Participate in sprint planning, backlog grooming, and retrospectives
DevOps & CI/CD

Integrate test automation with CI/CD tools (Jenkins, Azure DevOps, GitHub Actions)
Support continuous testing in Agile delivery environments
Monitor test execution and reporting
Required Skills & Qualifications

Technical Skills

Strong experience in:
Test Automation using Playwright (highly preferred)
JavaScript / TypeScript or Java/Python for automation
Experience in:
UI automation, API testing, and end-to-end testing
Version control systems (Git)
CI/CD pipelines
Familiarity with:
SQL and database validation
Test frameworks and design patterns
Domain Expertise (Mandatory)

Strong understanding of Capital Markets domain
Knowledge of:
Trading platforms and order management systems (OMS)
Market data feeds
Regulatory and compliance requirements
Experience in investment banking / brokerage / trading environments


Skills: MySQL~Core Java
Experience Required: 8-10, Project Code :

ALL CAPS, NO SPACES B/T UNDERSCORES PTN_US_GBAMSREQID_
Candidate BeelineID i.e. PTN_US_9999999_SKIPJOHNSON0413
MSP Owner: Thomas Hodges
Targeted Bill Rate- $60-$70hr
REQUIREMENT_CITY - New York - Need to come to office 3 Days Week & Face2Face Interview Required
REQUIREMENT_ID-10774943
Role Name - Java Full Stack

ROLE_DESCRIPTION -

We are looking for an experienced Java Full Stack Developer to build scalable, high-performance web applications. The candidate will be responsible for developing both backend services using Java technologies and modern frontend applications, ensuring seamless integration and optimal user experience.



Key Responsibilities

Backend Development

Design, develop, and maintain enterprise-grade applications using Java, Spring Boot, and Spring MVC
Build and maintain RESTful APIs and microservices
Implement business logic, security, and data processing workflows
Optimize application performance and scalability
Integrate with databases and third-party systems
Frontend Development

Develop responsive user interfaces using Angular / React / Vue.js
Work with HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, TypeScript
Ensure cross-browser compatibility and performance
Consume backend APIs and implement client-side logic
Full Stack Responsibilities

Work across the full technology stack (UI, middleware, backend)
Collaborate with architects, designers, and product teams
Ensure seamless integration between front-end and back-end components
Database & Integration

Design and manage relational databases (MySQL, PostgreSQL, Oracle)
Write optimized SQL queries and stored procedures
Work with ORM frameworks (Hibernate/JPA)
DevOps & Deployment

Deploy applications in cloud environments (AWS, Azure, GCP)
Build and maintain CI/CD pipelines (Jenkins, GitHub Actions, Azure DevOps)
Use containerization tools like Docker and Kubernetes
Testing & Maintenance

Write unit tests using JUnit, Mockito
Perform integration and system testing
Troubleshoot, debug, and enhance existing applications
Participate in code reviews and enforce coding standards
Required Skills & Qualifications

Technical Skills

Strong experience in:
Java (8 or higher)
Spring Boot, Spring MVC, Spring Security
RESTful API development
Frontend technologies:
Angular / React (preferred)
JavaScript, TypeScript
ORM frameworks:
Hibernate, JPA
Databases:
MySQL / PostgreSQL / Oracle
Tools:
Git, Maven, Gradle
Preferred Skills

Experience with Microservices architecture
Knowledge of Kafka / RabbitMQ (Event-driven systems)
Familiarity with API Gateway, Service Registry (Eureka, Zuul)
Hands-on with Docker, Kubernetes
Experience with Cloud platforms (AWS, Azure)
Knowledge of design patterns and SOLID principles
Soft Skills

Strong analytical and problem-solving abilities
Excellent communication and teamwork skills
Ability to work in Agile/Scrum environments
Ownership mindset with attention to quality and detail

Skills: MySQL~Core Java
Experience Required: 8-10, Project Code :

ALL CAPS, NO SPACES B/T UNDERSCORES PTN_US_GBAMSREQID_
Candidate BeelineID i.e. PTN_US_9999999_SKIPJOHNSON0413
MSP Owner: Thomas Hodges
Targeted Bill Rate- $65hr
REQUIREMENT_CITY - Jersey City, NJ - Parsippany, NJ - New York, NY
REQUIREMENT_ID-10648330
Role Name - Senior Reinsurance Business Systems Analyst

ROLE_DESCRIPTION -

Must Have Technical/Functional Skills
• Strong expertise in Reinsurance domain – Treaty, Facultative, Proportional & Non Proportional reinsurance.
• Hands on experience with requirements gathering, BRD/FSD creation, process flows, and gap analysis.
• Proficiency in SQL, data analysis, and validating premium/claims/bordereaux data.
• Strong understanding of reinsurance accounting (ceded premium, loss recoverable, statements of accounts).
• Experience with UAT/SIT – test planning, test case creation, execution, and defect management.
• Familiarity with reinsurance systems (SAP FS RI, SAPIENS SRM Genius or similar) and upstream/downstream integrations.


Roles & Responsibilities
• Collaborate with business stakeholders to gather, refine, and translate requirements into functional/technical specifications.
• Lead analysis and solution design for reinsurance processes, system enhancements, and BAU items.
• Perform detailed data validation, mapping, and root-cause analysis for premium/claims movements.
• Prepare process documents, workflows, and functional artefacts; facilitate requirement walkthroughs.
• Coordinate SIT/UAT cycles, ensuring quality delivery and traceability from requirements to test results.
• Act as a liaison between business, IT, vendors, and cross-functional teams to ensure alignment and timely delivery.

Generic Managerial Skills, If any
• Strong communication skills for stakeholder management across business, IT, and leadership groups.
• Ability to manage multiple workstreams, prioritize tasks, and deliver within timelines.
• Problem-solving mindset with attention to detail and ability to work independently.
• Ability to mentor junior team members and support knowledge transfer.
• Experience in Agile/Scrum ceremonies and backlog management.

Key Words to search in Resume
• “Reinsurance Business Analyst”
• “Ceded Reinsurance / Treaty / Facultative
• “Reinsurance Accounting / Bordereaux”
• “BRD / FSD / Requirements Gathering”
• “SQL / Data Analysis / UAT / SIT”
Reinsurance Systems


Skills: Business Analysis~ReInsurance~PL/SQL
Experience Required: 10 & Above, Project Code :

MSP Owner: Deepa Narayanan
Location: San Jose CA/ Lehi UT
Duration: 6 Months
GBaMS ReqID: 10734447

100% Onsite- preferred.

NOTES FROM SPOTLIGHT CALL:

Must Haves
• Strong hands-on experience in Python backend development with REST API development
• Experience building microservices-based applications using modern architectures
• Hands-on expertise with Docker, Kubernetes, and cloud platforms (AWS preferred)
• Strong understanding of GRC/compliance frameworks such as SOC2, ISO 27001, NIST, FedRAMP, etc.
• Experience building or supporting compliance automation, audit-ready systems, risk/control platforms, or governance workflows
• Strong knowledge of security implementation including RBAC, OAuth2/JWT, encryption, IAM, audit logging, and secure coding practices
• Experience integrating security/compliance controls into CI/CD pipelines (DevSecOps)
• Strong database experience with SQL/NoSQL (PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Oracle, etc.)
• Candidate should have a builder mindset — not just policy/audit experience, but actual engineering and system implementation experience
________________________________________
Good to Have
• Experience with Node.js / FastAPI / Flask
• Exposure to real-time compliance monitoring or governance platforms
• Experience in regulated environments such as banking, healthcare, fintech, or enterprise compliance systems
• Knowledge of Infrastructure as Code (Terraform, CloudFormation)
• Experience with monitoring/observability tools like Prometheus, Grafana, Datadog, CloudWatch
• Exposure to GenAI/AI-driven compliance automation
• Experience with data governance, lineage, and audit traceability systems
• Familiarity with Agile, DevSecOps, and secure SDLC practices
• Strong communication skills and ability to work with cross-functional security/compliance stakeholders
________________________________________
Important Screening Note for Vendors
We are specifically looking for a technical GRC Engineer profile with strong development and cloud engineering experience.
Pure GRC consultants, audit-only profiles, SOC analysts, or governance-only candidates without strong backend/system-building experience will not be considered.


GRC Engineer

Seeking a hands-on GRC Engineer with expertise in Python, API development, and modern architectures (microservices, Kubernetes, Docker). Must have experience building secure, scalable systems with strong database skills and understanding of compliance frameworks.

Experience Required: 6-8, Project Code :
