MSP Owner: Deepa Narayanan
Location: San Jose CA/ Lehi UT
Duration: 6 Months
GBaMS ReqID: 10734447

100% Onsite- preferred.

NOTES FROM SPOTLIGHT CALL:

Must Haves
• Strong hands-on experience in Python backend development with REST API development
• Experience building microservices-based applications using modern architectures
• Hands-on expertise with Docker, Kubernetes, and cloud platforms (AWS preferred)
• Strong understanding of GRC/compliance frameworks such as SOC2, ISO 27001, NIST, FedRAMP, etc.
• Experience building or supporting compliance automation, audit-ready systems, risk/control platforms, or governance workflows
• Strong knowledge of security implementation including RBAC, OAuth2/JWT, encryption, IAM, audit logging, and secure coding practices
• Experience integrating security/compliance controls into CI/CD pipelines (DevSecOps)
• Strong database experience with SQL/NoSQL (PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Oracle, etc.)
• Candidate should have a builder mindset — not just policy/audit experience, but actual engineering and system implementation experience
________________________________________
Good to Have
• Experience with Node.js / FastAPI / Flask
• Exposure to real-time compliance monitoring or governance platforms
• Experience in regulated environments such as banking, healthcare, fintech, or enterprise compliance systems
• Knowledge of Infrastructure as Code (Terraform, CloudFormation)
• Experience with monitoring/observability tools like Prometheus, Grafana, Datadog, CloudWatch
• Exposure to GenAI/AI-driven compliance automation
• Experience with data governance, lineage, and audit traceability systems
• Familiarity with Agile, DevSecOps, and secure SDLC practices
• Strong communication skills and ability to work with cross-functional security/compliance stakeholders
________________________________________
Important Screening Note for Vendors
We are specifically looking for a technical GRC Engineer profile with strong development and cloud engineering experience.
Pure GRC consultants, audit-only profiles, SOC analysts, or governance-only candidates without strong backend/system-building experience will not be considered.


GRC Engineer

Seeking a hands-on GRC Engineer with expertise in Python, API development, and modern architectures (microservices, Kubernetes, Docker). Must have experience building secure, scalable systems with strong database skills and understanding of compliance frameworks.

MSP Owner: Zach Provence
Location: ~Titusville, NJ~
Duration: 6 months
GBaMS ReqID: 10735421


Role Descriptions: Role Overview

We are seeking a highly skilled Technical Architect – Data & Analytics with over 10 years of experience to lead the design, architecture, and implementation of scalable data platforms. The ideal candidate will have deep expertise in data architecture, cloud-based analytics solutions, and Salesforce data integration, along with strong stakeholder engagement and communication skills.

This role will be instrumental in building a robust data ecosystem to support analytics, reporting, and emerging AI-driven initiatives within a pharma domain context, particularly in Patient Support Programs (PSP).

---

Key Responsibilities

· Architecture & Design

o Lead end-to-end architecture design for enterprise data and analytics platforms.

o Define scalable, reliable, and secure data architecture patterns for structured and unstructured data.

o Design data integration frameworks, pipelines, and data models to support analytics and reporting.

· Salesforce Data Integration

o Architect and implement solutions for ingesting and processing data from Salesforce platforms (e.g., Sales Cloud, Service Cloud, Health Cloud).

o Ensure data quality, consistency, and governance across Salesforce and downstream systems.

· Cloud & Data Platforms

o Design and build scalable solutions leveraging modern cloud platforms (AWS/Azure/GCP).

o Implement data lakes, data warehouses, and lakehouse architectures.

o Optimize data processing frameworks for performance and cost efficiency.

· Analytics & Reporting

o Enable BI and reporting solutions using tools like Power BI, Tableau, or similar.

o Ensure data availability and performance for downstream analytics and reporting teams.

o Support advanced analytics use cases including predictive and prescriptive analytics.

· AI & Advanced Capabilities (Nice to Have)

o Contribute to AI/ML initiatives including data preparation for machine learning models.

o Drive adoption of AI-enabled analytics and automation solutions.

· Stakeholder Management

o Collaborate with business stakeholders, product owners, and IT teams to align technical solutions with business goals.

o Translate business requirements into technical architecture and actionable road maps.

o Present architecture designs and solutions to senior leadership.

· Governance & Best Practices

o Establish and enforce data governance, security, and compliance standards.

o Promote best practices in data modeling, ETL/ELT processes, and DevOps.

o Ensure adherence to regulatory requirements, especially within the pharma domain.

---

Required Skills & Qualifications

· 10+ years of experience in Data Engineering, Data Architecture, or Analytics Platforms

· Strong expertise in:

o Data architecture (data modeling, warehousing, integration)

o ETL/ELT tools and frameworks

o Cloud platforms such as AWS, Azure, or GCP

· Proven experience in Salesforce data integration and architecture

· Experience designing scalable, enterprise-grade data platforms

· Knowledge of BI/reporting tools (Power BI, Tableau, etc.)

· Excellent analytical, problem-solving, and communication skills

· Demonstrated experience in stakeholder management and cross-functional collaboration

---

Nice to Have

· Experience with AI/ML implementation or data support for AI initiatives

· Knowledge of Patient Support Programs (PSP) in the Pharma/Life Sciences domain

· Familiarity with data governance and compliance standards (HIPAA, GDPR, etc.)

---

Soft Skills

· Strong leadership and decision-making capability

· Excellent verbal and written communication skills

· Ability to influence stakeholders and drive consensus

· Strategic thinking with a hands-on mindset

Essential Skills: Patient Support Program| Data Analytics| Saleforce
Desirable Skills:
Keyword:
Skills: Salesforce~Data Analytics & Insights : ignio AIOps~Data Architecture and Modeling
Experience Required: 6-8, Project Code :
data.skills: Data Analytics & Insights : ignio AIOps, Data Architecture and Modeling, salesforce

MSP Owner: Zach Provence
Location: ~Titusville, NJ~
Duration: 6 months
GBaMS ReqID: 10735413


Role Descriptions: Position Overview

We are seeking a highly skilled and experienced Senior Business Analyst (7+ years) to join our team. The ideal candidate will possess strong business analytical capabilities, deep experience in Patient Support Programs (PSP) within Commercial Pharma, and a proven ability to work closely with stakeholders to translate business needs into actionable solutions.

This role requires excellent communication skills, a proactive mindset, and the ability to thrive in a fast-paced, collaborative environment.

---

Key Responsibilities

· Business Analysis & Requirement Management

o Elicit, analyze, and document business requirements from stakeholders across Commercial Pharma functions.

o Translate complex business needs into clear, structured functional and technical specifications.

o Create high-quality deliverables including BRDs, FRDs, user stories, process flows, and use cases.

· Patient Support Programs (PSP) Expertise

o Work on initiatives related to Patient Support Programs, ensuring alignment with commercial objectives.

o Understand end-to-end PSP processes including onboarding, adherence, reimbursement, and patient engagement journeys.

o Provide insights and recommendations to optimize PSP operations and outcomes.

· Stakeholder & Customer Management

o Act as a liaison between business stakeholders, technology teams, and external partners.

o Build strong relationships with key stakeholders and ensure alignment on project objectives and deliverables.

o Manage expectations effectively and ensure timely communication of progress, risks, and issues.

· Solution Design & Delivery Support

o Collaborate with technical teams to ensure accurate implementation of requirements.

o Support UAT planning and execution, including test case preparation and defect tracking.

o Ensure solutions meet business objectives and quality standards.

· Documentation & Communication

o Maintain clear, concise, and comprehensive documentation throughout the project lifecycle.

o Communicate effectively with both technical and non-technical audiences.

o Deliver insights and updates through presentations, reports, and dashboards.

---

Required Qualifications

· 7+ years of experience as a Business Analyst or similar role.

· Strong expertise in Business Analysis, Requirement Gathering, and Documentation.

· Hands-on experience in Patient Support Programs (PSP) within Commercial Pharma.

· Proven ability in stakeholder and customer management across multiple levels.

· Excellent communication skills (verbal and written).

· Demonstrated ability to work in a fast-paced environment with a quick, responsive approach to problem-solving.

---

Preferred / Good-to-Have Skills

· Experience with Agile methodologies (Scrum, Kanban, etc.).

· Strong presentation and storytelling skills.

· Knowledge of data analytics and reporting tools (e.g., Power BI, Tableau, SQL).

· Exposure to data-driven decision making and KPI tracking.

· Familiarity with pharmaceutical commercial operations and compliance frameworks.

---

Key Competencies

· Strong analytical and critical thinking skills

· Excellent interpersonal and stakeholder management abilities

· Proactive and solution-oriented mindset

· High attention to detail

· Ability to prioritize and manage multiple tasks effectively

Essential Skills: Patient Support Program Experience| Data Analytics
Desirable Skills:
Keyword:
Skills: Business Analysis~Data Analytics & Insights : ignio AIOps
Experience Required: 6-8, Project Code :

o Build strong relationships with key stakeholders and ensure alignment on project objectives and deliverables.

o Manage expectations effectively and ensure timely communication of progress, risks, and issues.

· Solution Design & Delivery Support

o Collaborate with technical teams to ensure accurate implementation of requirements.

o Support UAT planning and execution, including test case preparation and defect tracking.

o Ensure solutions meet business objectives and quality standards.

· Documentation & Communication

o Maintain clear, concise, and comprehensive documentation throughout the project lifecycle.

o Communicate effectively with both technical and non-technical audiences.

o Deliver insights and updates through presentations, reports, and dashboards.

---

Required Qualifications

· 7+ years of experience as a Business Analyst or similar role.

· Strong expertise in Business Analysis, Requirement Gathering, and Documentation.

· Hands-on experience in Patient Support Programs (PSP) within Commercial Pharma.

· Proven ability in stakeholder and customer management across multiple levels.

· Excellent communication skills (verbal and written).

· Demonstrated ability to work in a fast-paced environment with a quick, responsive approach to problem-solving.

---

Preferred / Good-to-Have Skills

· Experience with Agile methodologies (Scrum, Kanban, etc.).

· Strong presentation and storytelling skills.

· Knowledge of data analytics and reporting tools (e.g., Power BI, Tableau, SQL).

· Exposure to data-driven decision making and KPI tracking.

· Familiarity with pharmaceutical commercial operations and compliance frameworks.

---

Key Competencies

· Strong analytical and critical thinking skills

· Excellent interpersonal and stakeholder management abilities

· Proactive and solution-oriented mindset

· High attention to detail

· Ability to prioritize and manage multiple tasks effectively

Essential Skills: Patient Support Program Experience| Data Analytics

Responsibilities:

· Define end-to-end architecture and technical design for PeopleSoft FSCM and related enterprise systems, including integration with middleware, external platforms, and enterprise architecture standards.

· Lead onsite and offshore development and support teams, providing direction on coding, customization, configuration, planning, estimation, prioritization, quality, compliance, and risk management across the project lifecycle.

· Oversee application development and support activities including coding, unit testing, deployment, integration and system testing support, defect resolution, root cause analysis, incident management, problem resolution, and SLA adherence for L2/L3 services.

· Serve as the primary TCS technical point of contact for stakeholders, collaborating with business, functional, infrastructure, and client teams while supporting governance, status reviews, escalations, change management, incident management, and release processes.

· Establish best practices, reusable frameworks, coding standards, and SDLC compliance, while driving continuous improvement, automation, test strategy, and delivery excellence.

· Coach and mentor team members, lead knowledge transfer, build reusable artifacts, and contribute to demand planning, resource ramp-up, and governance with on-call coverage (after business hours and weekend) for critical incidents.

· Apply deep technical expertise in PeopleTools, Application Engine, Component Interfaces, Integration Broker, Web Services, APIs, SQR, Application Packages, Workflow, Oracle, and related integration platforms, with strong functional understanding of finance, supply chain, and HR processes.

ALL CAPS, NO SPACES B/T UNDERSCORES

Bill Rate $80 - $90

PTN_US_GBAMSREQID_CANDIDATEBEELINEID
i.e. PTN_US_9999999_SKIPJOHNSON0413

MSP Owner: Zach Provence
Location: ~Titusville, NJ~
Duration: 6 months
GBaMS ReqID: 10735406


Role Descriptions: · Serve as the primary functional authority for design, implementation, and optimization of patient support programs (HUB, adherence, financial assistance, case management, nurse outreach).

· Map and optimize the patient journey from diagnosis -> treatment initiation -> adherence -> ongoing support, identifying key touchpoints, handoffs, and escalation paths.

· Define and document functional requirements, acceptance criteria, and user stories for program platforms, CRM systems (Salesforce preferred), vendor portals, and integrations (EMR, specialty pharmacy, payer systems).

· Lead data migration functional planning and validation for patient and case data (source-to-target mapping, de-duplication strategy, data quality rules, reconciliation criteria).

· Translate regulatory, privacy, and compliance requirements (e.g., HIPAA, local data protection, adverse event reporting) into operational controls and system configuration requirements.

· Work with vendors and internal IT to design integrations with specialty pharmacies, distributors, third-party administrators, and payer clearinghouses; ensure seamless prescription routing and status updates.

· Establish KPIs and outcomes for patient support (time-to-first-dose, enrollment conversion, adherence rates, patient satisfaction, financial assistance utilization); set up dashboards and reporting requirements.

· Provide subject-matter guidance to project teams, and commercial strategy; facilitate cross-functional workshops and decision sessions.

· Develop SOPs, process flows, training materials, and acceptance test scripts; conduct or support end-user training and UAT.

· Participate in pilot designs, proof-of-concept testing, rollouts, and continuous improvement initiatives; champion patient-centric design principles.


Required Qualifications

· 7+ years of hands-on experience in patient support programs / HUB operations / patient services within the pharmaceutical sector .

· Demonstrated expertise with specialty pharmacy workflows, prescription fulfillment and dispense lifecycles, and payer/patient reimbursement pathways.

· Proven experience defining functional requirements and delivering projects involving CRM systems (Salesforce experience strongly preferred).

· Experience leading or contributing to data migration efforts for patient/case data, including mapping, cleansing, validation, and reconciliation.

· Strong knowledge of patient privacy and regulatory requirements (HIPAA, local privacy laws, pharmacovigilance reporting obligations).

· Excellent stakeholder management skills — able to influence cross-functional teams including commercial, medical, legal/compliance, IT, and external vendors.

· Strong process design and documentation skills (SOPs, process maps, acceptance criteria, test plans).

· Demonstrable track record of driving measurable operational improvements and implementing KPIs for patient support services.

· Bachelor’s degree in Life Sciences, Pharmacy, Nursing, Healthcare Management, Business, or related field. Advanced degree or relevant certifications a plus.


Preferred / Highly Desirable

· Direct experience implementing Salesforce Health Cloud, Service Cloud, or similar CRM platforms in a patient-support context.

· Hands-on experience with specialty pharmacy or HUB vendor integrations and knowledge of standards/APIs used for prescription/fulfillment (e.g., HL7, FHIR concepts, EDI).

· Experience with cloud-based deployments, CI/CD for configuration-driven platforms, or working alongside technical architects on integration architecture.

· Experience in global program roll-outs or multi-country regulatory environments.

· Background in nursing, pharmacy, or case management with practical patient-facing experience.

· Familiarity with digital engagement tools (patient portals, mobile apps, chatbots) and behavior-change approaches to improve adherence.

· Knowledge of co-pay accumulator rules, savings card mechanics, manufacturer-sponsored PAPs, and third-party payer interactions.


Core Skills & Competencies


· Patient-centric mindset .

· Strong analytical and problem-solving skills; comfortable working with both qualitative process detail and quantitative metrics.

· Clear, concise communicator; able to produce high quality documentation and deliver compelling stakeholder presentations.

· Project-oriented with ability to work in agile and waterfall environments; comfortable with ambiguity and able to drive decisions.

· Detail-oriented with excellent quality assurance focus for data and process validation.

· Leadership presence; able to mentor junior staff and lead cross-functional teams.


Success Metrics (First 6–12 Months)

· Complete full patient journey mapping and gap analysis for targeted program(s) and present prioritized roadmap.

· Deliver functional requirements and acceptance criteria for CRM/HUB enhancements, enabling development sprint work.

· Define and implement a comprehensive data migration validation framework and lead one successful migration pilot.

· Establish baseline KPIs and dashboards for program performance and patient outcomes with initial recommendations for improvement.

· Achieve stakeholder alignment across commercial, medical, and compliance on program design and SOPs.

Essential Skills: Patient Support Program SME
Desirable Skills:
Keyword:
Skills: Digital : Salesforce Development and Technical Design~Data Analytics & Insights : ignio AIOps~Communication
Experience Required: 10 & Above, Project Code :
data.skills: Communication, Data Analytics & Insights : ignio AIOps, Digital : Salesforce Development and Technical Design

PTN_US_GBAMSREQID_CANDIDATEBEELINEID
i.e. PTN_US_9999999_SKIPJOHNSON0413

MSP Owner: Zach Provence
Location: ~San Diego,CA~
Duration: 6 months
GBaMS ReqID: 10768791


Role Descriptions: Must Have Technical/Functional Skills

Must-Have Skills

· Strong expertise in V&V for medical devices

· Hands-on experience in:

o Protocol writing (IQ, OQ, PQ, CSV, system validation)

o Validation execution and reporting

· Deep understanding of:

o FDA regulations (21 CFR Part 820)

o ISO 13485 standards

o Risk management (ISO 14971)

· Experience in regulated environments with minimal supervision

· Ability to independently manage multiple protocols simultaneously


Preferred Skills

· Experience with complex medical systems (e.g., imaging systems, surgical systems, or

similar platforms like Elita)

· Exposure to software validation / computerized system validation (CSV)

· Prior experience in large-scale validation programs (100+ protocols) · Strong documentation and audit readiness experience · Familiarity with tools like: o TrackWise / Veeva / ETQ (or similar QMS systems) Experience Requirement · 8–12+ years in V&V within the medical device industry · Proven experience working as a Subject Matter Expert (SME) · Prior experience working in onsite client environments in the US is a strong plus · Expat profiles are acceptable Candidate Profile · Self-driven and capable of working independently with minimal guidance · Strong ownership mindset with execution focus · Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills · Comfortable working under tight timelines and immediate onboarding expectations

Roles & Responsibilities

Role Overview:


We are looking for experienced Validation & Verification (V&V) experts to support protocol

development and execution for the Elita system. The role requires independent ownership of

end-to-end V&V activities with minimal onboarding or training. The candidate will contribute

toward executing approximately 150–170 validation protocols within a defined timeline


Key Responsibilities:


· Independently author, review, and execute V&V protocols (IQ/OQ/PQ, system

validation, software validation, etc.)

· Ensure all validation activities comply with regulatory standards (FDA, ISO 13485, 21

CFR Part 820)

· Drive end-to-end protocol lifecycle, including:

o Protocol authoring

o Test execution

o Documentation and reporting

o Defect tracking and resolution

· Collaborate with cross-functional teams (R&D, Quality, Manufacturing, Regulatory)

· Provide SME-level inputs for validation strategy and risk-based validation approaches

· Support audit readiness and documentation for regulatory inspections

· Work in a high-paced environment with immediate delivery expectations



Generic Managerial Skills, If any

1. Leadership
2. Communication Skills
3. Stakeholder Management
4. Decision Making
5. Problem Solving
6. Mentoring & Coaching
7. Conflict Resolution
8. Strategic Thinking
9. Time & Priority Management
10. Adaptability & Flexibility

Desirable Skills:
Keyword:
Skills: ISO 13485~EIS : Medical Device & Regulations
Experience Required: 10 & Above, Project Code :

data.public_job_desc:
Job

U.S. citizen ONLY -NO Green Card holders

Requirements* Description We are seeking an experienced Cloud Security Engineer to design, implement, and manage cloud network security controls in GCP. The role focuses on Infrastructure-as-Code (IaC) delivery using Terraform, integrated into Azure DevOps Pipelines and GitHub Actions. The ideal candidate is a subject matter expert (SME) who can build secure, automated solutions from the ground up using Terraform, while documenting and transferring knowledge to internal teams. This role requires the ability to balance planned project execution within agile methodologies with rapid incident response (P0–P3) in a dynamic, fast-paced environment. Responsibilities · Design, implement, and manage cloud-native network security controls in GCP, including: o GCP VPC Service Controls (VPC-SC) o GCP Cloud Armor (DDoS/WAF protection) o GCP Cloud Next-Gen Firewall (NGFW Enterprise) with IPS/IDS o Zscaler Cloud Connector · Develop, maintain, and scale Terraform-based Infrastructure-as-Code modules for cloud infrastructure and security policies. · Build, enhance, and manage CI/CD automation using Azure DevOps Pipelines and GitHub Actions. · Author clear documentation, runbooks, and deliver knowledge transfers and training to operational and engineering teams. · Collaborate cross-functionally with cloud, security, and development teams to ensure secure, scalable solutions. · Participate in agile ceremonies for planned project work and provide rapid incident response during P0–P3 security/networking events.

Required Qualifications · U.S. citizenship is required (by birth or naturalization); Green Card holders are not eligible. · Work must be performed within the United States (onshore only; no offshore work permitted). · 5+ years of hands-on experience as a Cloud Engineer or Cloud Security Engineer. · 3+ years of hands-on experience with GCP network security services, including VPC Service Controls (VPC-SC), Cloud Armor, and NGFW with IPS/IDS. · Strong expertise in Terraform (designing reusable modules, managing state, enterprise workflows). · Proficiency in CI/CD tools: Azure DevOps Pipelines and GitHub Actions. · Scripting proficiency (PowerShell, Bash, or Python) for automation and troubleshooting. · Demonstrated experience documenting technical solutions, producing clear runbooks, and performing knowledge transfers to enable operational adoption. · Strong troubleshooting and incident response skills in cloud environments. Preferred Qualifications · Experience integrating AI/ML and agentic platforms (e.g., Anthropic Claude or similar) into DevOps pipelines to automate processes, improve operational efficiency, and accelerate delivery timelines. · Experience with additional CI/CD platforms (e.g., GitLab CI, Jenkins, CircleCI) and configuration management tools (e.g., Ansible). · Relevant certifications: o Cloud Security / Architecture: Google Professional Cloud Security Engineer or Google Professional Cloud Architect o IaC / DevOps: HashiCorp Certified: Terraform Associate or Azure DevOps Engineer Exper

Design, implement, and manage cloud-native network security controls in GCP, including: · GCP VPC Service Controls (VPC-SC) · GCP Cloud Armor (DDoS/WAF protection) · GCP Cloud Next-Gen Firewall (NGFW Enterprise) with IPS/IDS · Zscaler Cloud Connector

· Develop, maintain, and scale Terraform-based Infrastructure-as-Code modules for cloud infrastructure and security policies. · Build, enhance, and manage CI/CD automation using Azure DevOps Pipelines and GitHub Actions. · Author clear documentation, runbooks, and deliver knowledge transfers and training to operational and engineering teams. · Collaborate cross-functionally with cloud, security, and development teams to ensure secure, scalable solutions. · Participate in agile ceremonies for planned project work and provide rapid incident response during P0–P3 security/networking events. · · Collaborate with security, network, and application teams to enforce security best practices. · Automate infrastructure provisioning and deployment using Infrastructure as Code (IaC). · Monitor and optimize cloud security posture and performance. · Troubleshoot and resolve issues related to networking, security policies, and connectivity. · Ensure compliance with enterprise security standards and governance policies. · Participate in design reviews, risk assessments, and incident response activities. Required Qualifications · U.S. citizenship is required (by birth or naturalization); Green Card holders are not eligible. · Work must be performed within the United States (onshore only; no offshore work permitted). · 5+ years of hands-on experience as a Cloud Engineer or Cloud Security Engineer. · 3+ years of hands-on experience with GCP network security services, including VPC Service Controls (VPC-SC), Cloud Armor, and NGFW with IPS/IDS. · Strong expertise in Terraform (designing reusable modules, managing state, enterprise workflows). · Proficiency in CI/CD tools: Azure DevOps Pipelines and GitHub Actions. · Scripting proficiency (PowerShell, Bash, or Python) for automation and troubleshooting. · Demonstrated experience documenting technical solutions, producing clear runbooks, and performing knowledge transfers to enable operational adoption. Strong troubleshooting and incident response skills in cloud environments.


Section IV - Job Qualifications & Skills

Section Details / Example Content

Domain Required Qualifications · U.S. citizenship is required (by birth or naturalization); Green Card holders are not eligible. · Work must be performed within the United States (onshore only; no offshore work permitted). · 5+ years of hands-on experience as a Cloud Engineer or Cloud Security Engineer. · 3+ years of hands-on experience with GCP network security services, including VPC Service Controls (VPC-SC), Cloud Armor, and NGFW with IPS/IDS. · Strong expertise in Terraform (designing reusable modules, managing state, enterprise workflows). · Proficiency in CI/CD tools: Azure DevOps Pipelines and GitHub Actions. · Scripting proficiency (PowerShell, Bash, or Python) for automation and troubleshooting. · Demonstrated experience documenting technical solutions, producing clear runbooks, and performing knowledge transfers to enable operational adoption. Strong troubleshooting and incident response skills in cloud environments.

Soft Skills · Strong communication and collaboration skills · Proactive, self-driven, and eager to learn · Ability to work in a fast-paced, agile environment

Education

Requirements Optional

Certifications · eQIP Experience integrating AI/ML and agentic platforms (e.g., Anthropic Claude or similar) into DevOps pipelines to automate processes, improve operational efficiency, and accelerate delivery timelines. · Experience with additional CI/CD platforms (e.g., GitLab CI, Jenkins, CircleCI) and configuration management tools (e.g., Ansible). · Relevant certifications: o Cloud Security / Architecture: Google Professional Cloud Security Engineer or Google Professional Cloud Architect

o IaC / DevOps: HashiCorp Certified: Terraform Associate or Azure DevOps Engineer Expert

data.public_job_desc:
Experienced Clinical Informaticist to bridge clinical practice and technology by translating clinical

workflows, data, and standards into effective digital solutions. The role focuses on ensuring that clinical

data, systems, and analytics are accurate, interoperable, and aligned with care delivery and regulatory

needs.


Roles & Responsibilities

· Act as a liaison between clinical stakeholders and technical teams

· Analyze and document clinical workflows, use cases, and data requirements

· Translate clinical needs into functional and data specifications

· Support implementation and optimization of clinical systems and digital health solutions

· Ensure correct use and interpretation of clinical terminologies, codes, and standards

· Support interoperability and data exchange initiatives across systems and platforms

· Validate clinical data outputs for accuracy, consistency, and usability

· Participate in testing, UAT, and clinical sign-off activities

· Support clinical quality, reporting, analytics, and compliance use cases · Contribute to clinical governance, documentation, and best-practice guidelines · Strong understanding of clinical workflows and healthcare data · Experience working with clinical terminologies and coding systems · Ability to translate clinical concepts into system, data, or reporting requirements · Experience collaborating with engineers, product owners, and data teams · Strong analytical, communication, and documentation skills · Experience working in Agile or SDLC-based delivery models

Generic Managerial Skills, If any

Experience working in agile development projects and sprint deliver

Key Words to search in Resume

Clinical Informaticist, Clinical Informatics, Healthcare Data, Clinical Workflow, Interoperability, FHIR,

SNOMED, Health IT, Clinical Systems


Pre-Screening Questionnaire

7+ years as Clinical Informaticist

workflows, data, and standards into effective digital solutions. The role focuses on ensuring that clinical

data, systems, and analytics are accurate, interoperable, and aligned with care delivery and regulatory

needs.

**Please strictly adhere to the following resume naming convention:
ALL CAPS, NO SPACES B/T UNDERSCORES

Bill Rate $70 - $75

PTN_US_GBAMSREQID_CANDIDATEBEELINEID
i.e. PTN_US_9999999_SKIPJOHNSON0413

MSP Owner: Zach Provence
Location: ~Raritan, NJ~
Duration: 6 months
GBaMS ReqID: 10767797


Role Descriptions: Led end-to-end SAP APO implementations/support across DP, SNP, PP/DS, and GATP from requirement gathering through design, configuration, testing (UT/SIT/UAT), cutover, and hypercare.

Conducted business workshops to map planning and fulfillment processes, documented AS-IS/TO-BE flows, and translated requirements into functional designs and configuration workbooks.

Built and stabilized APO–ERP integration using CIF by creating/maintaining integration models, monitoring and troubleshooting qRFC queues, and performing data reconciliation between APO and ERP.

Ensured APO master data readiness and governance, including products, locations, resources, calendars, planning horizons, transportation lanes, quota arrangements, and PDS/PPM structures.

Configured SAP APO Demand Planning (DP) planning areas, key figures, planning levels, time series settings, and versions aligned to S&OP/consensus demand processes.

Implemented and tuned DP statistical forecasting (model selection/parameters), managed outliers and intermittency, and developed macros to support forecast adjustments and exception-based planning.

Defined forecast validation approach and improved forecast quality using KPIs such as bias and MAPE, partnering with business users to drive adoption of standard planning practices.

Configured SAP APO Supply Network Planning (SNP) for multi-echelon supply networks, including sourcing, lead times, lot sizing, safety stock inputs, and constraint handling.

Executed and tuned SNP planning runs (heuristics and/or optimizer where applicable), analyzed results, and refined planning logic to balance service levels, inventory, and capacity feasibility.

Implemented SNP deployment and replenishment logic and (where required) Transport Load Builder (TLB) to support shipment consolidation and executable supply plans.

Configured SAP APO PP/DS for finite scheduling and detailed sequencing, including capacities, modes, setup times (including sequence-dependent setups if used), and pegging strategies.

Maintained PP/DS PDS/PPM alignment with ERP BOM/routings/production versions and ensured correct order creation/transfer for planned orders and production/process orders.

Supported planners using PP/DS heuristics and the DS Planning Board to resolve bottlenecks, improve schedule adherence, reduce changeovers, and manage exceptions.

Configured SAP GATP check strategies and Rules-Based ATP (RBA) to improve confirmation accuracy and align order promising with real supply and business priorities.

Implemented and supported Backorder Processing (BOP) to reprioritize demand and re-confirm orders based on configurable rules (priority customers, requested dates, allocation policies).

Set up product allocation/substitution logic (as applicable) to manage constrained materials and improve service to strategic customers while maintaining policy compliance.

Developed functional specifications for enhancements and interfaces, coordinated with ABAP/technical teams, and validated developments against business scenarios.

Created operational runbooks, monitoring procedures, and job schedules for planning runs and CIF health checks; improved stability and reduced recurring production incidents.

Delivered end-user training, SOPs, and knowledge transfer to support teams, improving planner adoption and reducing dependency on IT.

Performed root-cause analysis for planning result issues (incorrect pegging, missing receipts, CIF errors, master data gaps) and drove corrective actions through change management., Project Code :

**Please strictly adhere to the following resume naming convention:

ALL CAPS, NO SPACES B/T UNDERSCORES

Bill Rate: $65.00- $67.00

PTN_US_GBAMSREQID_CandidateBeelineID
i.e. PTN_US_9999999_SKIPJOHNSON0413

MSP Owner: Deepa Narayanan
Location: Gloucester, MA
Duration: 6 Months
GBaMS ReqID: 10757282

100% ONSITE ROLE

Physical Security Consultant

Project Delivery & Execution
• Review and intake physical security project assessments provided by business stakeholders.
• Hiring Manager is seeking a candidate with experience in construction project management, C CURE, and video systems.
• Manage end to end project workflow, including mobilization, design coordination, installation, commissioning, and security operations handover.
• Develop and maintain detailed project schedules, milestones, and deliverables, track progress and dependencies across multiple stakeholders.
• Prepare programming sheets and technical inputs for security programmers and system administrators in accordance with design standards.
• Close out projects using commissioning documentation, acceptance criteria, and key performance indicators (KPIs) to confirm business requirements are met.
• Provide periodic status reporting on all deliverables.

Stakeholder & Cross Functional Collaboration
• Partner with stakeholder and vendors to ensure coordinated execution.
• Communicate project status, risks, timelines, and dependencies through regular written updates and stakeholder reviews.
• Escalate schedule delays, risks, and major obstacles to leadership with clear mitigation recommendations.
• Act as a trusted project interface between technical teams and business stakeholders, translating security and technology requirements into executable plans.
Vendor & Financial Management
• Tracking materials allocation, installation sequencing, and vendor deliverables for security design and implementation.
• Support project budget planning, tracking, forecasting, and variance reporting.

Standards, Governance & Continuous Improvement
• Ensure all projects comply with Applied Materials Security Design, standards, and best practices.
• Assess project designs and implementations for scalability, sustainability, and long-term operational impact (e.g., network capacity, system expandability).
• Maintain process documentation, standards, and best practice guidance for physical security technology.

Functional Knowledge
• Physical security project management professional with strong domain expertise.
• Demonstrates in depth knowledge of physical security technologies and project delivery, with working awareness of security operations.
• Maintains familiarity with industry standard access control, video management, and integrated security platforms.

Business Expertise
• Anticipates business, regulatory, and operational risks within security projects.
• Recommends process, technology, and delivery improvements to enhance efficiency, resiliency, and business alignment.

Leadership & Project Management
• Leads security projects with moderate to high complexity, risk, and cross functional impact.
• Establishes project execution strategies, governance structures, and delivery cadence.
• Influences without authority by aligning diverse stakeholder groups around common objectives and timelines.

Problem Solving
• Resolves unique and unexpected project challenges requiring conceptual and innovative thinking.
• Applies structured problem solving to technical, scheduling, and stakeholder issues with broad business impact.

Experience & Qualifications
• Bachelor’s or Associate degree required; equivalent combination of education and experience will be considered.
• 10+ years of progressive experience in physical security, security technology, or infrastructure project management.
• Demonstrated experience managing multi-site or regional security technology projects.
• Working experience with enterprise security platforms (C-Cure, Avigilon, intrusion detection) and systems integration concepts are required.
• Project management experience using structured methodologies, scheduling tools, and reporting frameworks. (PSP, PMM, Agile)

Skills
• Strong project and program management capabilities.
• Excellent stakeholder engagement and cross functional coordination skills.
• Budget tracking, schedule management, and risk mitigation.
• Analytical mindset with attention to detail and sustainability.
• High proficiency in Microsoft Office and security project documentation tools., Project Code :

Candidate BeelineID i.e. PTN_US_9999999_SKIPJOHNSON0413
MSP Owner: Thomas Hodges
Targeted Bill Rate- $78hr
REQUIREMENT_CITY - Newark, NJ - (No Remote – 3 days in office).
REQUIREMENT_ID-10770234
Role Name - Azure AI Engineer

ROLE_DESCRIPTION -

Linked in URL is mandatory
NJ candidates will be given priority compared to candidates from other locations joining on day 1. We are open for other locations candidates who are willing to relocate but NJ based candidates will be given priority based on our past experience.
Microsoft Certified: Azure AI Engineer Associate or the Azure AI Apps and Agents Developer Associate will be given priority compared to other candidates. If the candidate is certified, request to include the respective Microsoft Certification link in the resume (without that certificate credentials are not accepted).

Role Overview
An Azure AI Foundry AI Engineer designs, builds, and deploys intelligent generative AI, agentic workflows, and RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) applications. This role requires coding with Python, orchestrating AI models, and adhering to responsible AI standards for enterprise scalability
Key Responsibilities
• AI & Agent Development: Design autonomous or semi-autonomous AI agents and RAG pipelines using Azure AI Foundry (formerly Azure AI Studio).
• Model Orchestration & Integration: Build and fine-tune large language models (LLMs) and integrate them with business applications, Copilot Studio, and data pipelines.
• Testing & Evaluation: Implement performance and evaluation tooling (such as RAGAS or TruLens) to assess grounding accuracy, reduce hallucinations, and ensure model explainability.
• Infrastructure Management: Develop scalable AI infrastructure and maintain reusable AI components in accordance with engineering best practices (version control, observability, CI/CD
Core Requirements & Skills
• Technical Skills: Proficiency in Python, prompt engineering, and utilizing frameworks like LangChain, Semantic Kernel, or crewAI.
• Cloud Experience: Deep understanding of the Microsoft Azure ecosystem, including Azure OpenAI Service, Azure Machine Learning, and Microsoft Fabric.
• AI Governance: Strong focus on Responsible AI and Model Context Protocol (MCP) to ensure security, privacy, and fairness in model outputs.
• Experience: Typically requires a bachelor’s degree in computer science or a related field, alongside 2-5+ years of software or AI/ML engineering experience



Skills: AI and Automation~Communication
Experience Required: 8-10, Project Code :

An Azure AI Foundry AI Engineer designs, builds, and deploys intelligent generative AI, agentic workflows, and RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) applications. This role requires coding with Python, orchestrating AI models, and adhering to responsible AI standards for enterprise scalability
Key Responsibilities
• AI & Agent Development: Design autonomous or semi-autonomous AI agents and RAG pipelines using Azure AI Foundry (formerly Azure AI Studio).
• Model Orchestration & Integration: Build and fine-tune large language models (LLMs) and integrate them with business applications, Copilot Studio, and data pipelines.
• Testing & Evaluation: Implement performance and evaluation tooling (such as RAGAS or TruLens) to assess grounding accuracy, reduce hallucinations, and ensure model explainability.
• Infrastructure Management: Develop scalable AI infrastructure and maintain reusable AI components in accordance with engineering best practices (version control, observability, CI/CD
Core Requirements & Skills
• Technical Skills: Proficiency in Python, prompt engineering, and utilizing frameworks like LangChain, Semantic Kernel, or crewAI.
• Cloud Experience: Deep understanding of the Microsoft Azure ecosystem, including Azure OpenAI Service, Azure Machine Learning, and Microsoft Fabric.
• AI Governance: Strong focus on Responsible AI and Model Context Protocol (MCP) to ensure security, privacy, and fairness in model outputs.
• Experience: Typically requires a bachelor’s degree in computer science or a related field, alongside 2-5+ years of software or AI/ML engineering experience



Skills: AI and Automation~Communication
Experience Required: 8-10, Project Code :

Role Name - SAP FS-RI Consultant (Reinsurance Management)

ROLE_DESCRIPTION -

Must Have Technical/Functional Skills

· Strong hands‑on experience with SAP FS‑RI (Reinsurance) configuration and support

· Proven reinsurance domain expertise, including:

Treaty & Facultative reinsurance

Proportional and Non‑Proportional structures

Ceded and Assumed reinsurance

· Experience with treaty/contract setup, premium calculation, postings, and estimations

· Functional knowledge of claims processing, recoveries, commissions, settlements, UPR, and reinstatement premiums

· Strong understanding of reinsurance accounting principles

· Experience supporting month‑end, quarter‑end, and year‑end close processes

· Integration experience with:

SAP S/4HANA Finance (FI‑GL, FI‑AP, FI‑AR)

SAP FS‑CD

· Ability to analyze posting logic, document flow, reconciliation issues, and data discrepancies

· Experience supporting SIT, UAT, and production issues

· Ability to prepare functional specifications and support business requirement discussions

· Exposure to SAP and non‑SAP system interfaces

· Basic ABAP debugging/log analysis skills

· Insurance/Reinsurance industry experience is mandatory

· 6+ years of SAP experience with 3+ years of hands‑on SAP FS‑RI experience

Roles & Responsibilities

· Analyze business requirements related to reinsurance processes and translate them into SAP FS‑RI functional solutions

· Configure and support SAP FS‑RI for treaty and facultative reinsurance, including proportional and non‑proportional structures

· Set up and maintain reinsurance contracts, treaties, sections, and participation structures

· Support premium calculation, estimations, postings, claims, recoveries, commissions, and settlements

· Ensure accurate reinsurance accounting and postings to SAP S/4HANA Finance

· Manage UPR, reinstatement premiums, and period‑end reinsurance activities

· Support month‑end, quarter‑end, and year‑end close processes related to reinsurance

· Work closely with Finance, Actuarial, and Business stakeholders to resolve functional issues

· Support and coordinate system integration with SAP FS‑CD, SAP FI, and upstream/downstream systems

· Prepare and maintain functional specifications, configuration documents, and test scenarios

· Support SIT, UAT, defect resolution, and production issues

· Analyze and resolve posting errors, reconciliation issues, and data discrepancies

· Ensure compliance with internal controls, audit, and regulatory requirements

· Participate in change management, transports, and release activities

· Provide knowledge transfer and support to onshore/offshore teams as required

Generic Managerial Skills, If any

· Strong communication skills for stakeholder management across business, IT, and leadership groups.

· Ability to manage multiple workstreams, prioritize tasks, and deliver within timelines.

· Problem-solving mindset with attention to detail and ability to work independently.

· Ability to mentor junior team members and support knowledge transfer.

· Experience in Agile/Scrum ceremonies and backlog management.

Key Words to search in Resume



· SAP FS‑RI / FSRI

· Reinsurance

· Treaty & Facultative

· Proportional / Non‑Proportional

· Ceded & Assumed Reinsurance

· Treaty Configuration / Contract Setup

· Premium Calculation / EPI / UPR

· Claims & Recoveries

· SAP S/4HANA Finance (FI‑GL)

· SAP FS‑CD Integration


Skills: ReInsurance~PL/SQL
Experience Required: 10 & Above, Project Code :

data.public_job_desc:
Bill Rate $60.00 - $75.00

MSP Owner: Rob Finton
Location: Atlanta, GA
Duration: 6 months
GBaMS ReqID: 10752893

Competencies: Oracle Application Development Framework (ADF) - 8+ years experience required

Top 5 Must-Have Skills / Experience

1. Strong Oracle ADF Upgrade Experience (ADF 12c → ADF 14c)
Hands-on experience upgrading Oracle ADF Faces, ADF BC, task flows, bindings, and WebLogic deployments to WebLogic 14.1.2.x.

2. Java Modernization Expertise (JDK 8 → Java 21)
Proven experience remediating deprecated APIs, handling `javax` to `jakarta` migration, JAXB/JTA changes, and upgrading enterprise Java applications to Java 21/GraalVM.

3. WebLogic & Middleware Migration Experience
Deep understanding of WebLogic 12c/14c administration, deployment troubleshooting, JVM tuning (G1GC/ZGC), SSL/TLS 1.3 compatibility, webservice knowledge and OCI-based deployments.

4. Integration & API Upgrade Experience
Experience upgrading and validating REST/SOAP integrations, Jersey migration (1.x/2.x → 3.x), SFTP/SSH integrations, Quartz scheduler, MyBatis, and enterprise middleware components.

5. Enterprise Application Support & Testing Mindset
Strong regression testing, performance benchmarking, production support, and UAT bug-fix experience for mission-critical HR or financial applications in hybrid work environments.
---
Top 5 Don’t-Have / Not Suitable For

1. No Pure Support or Maintenance Profiles
Candidates with only L1/L2 production support experience and no hands-on upgrade/migration development work.

2. No Junior-Level ADF Developers
Candidates without real enterprise-scale Oracle ADF/WebLogic migration experience or exposure to large integrated systems.

3. No Candidates Limited to Legacy Java Versions Only
Candidates who have worked only on Java 6/7/8 maintenance projects without Java 17/21 modernization exposure.

4. No Remote-Only Candidates
Must be comfortable working in hybrid mode and coming to office at least twice a week.

5. No Candidates Without Integration Troubleshooting Experience
Candidates lacking experience in REST/SOAP/SFTP integrations, dependency remediation, SSL/TLS handling, or middleware troubleshooting in enterprise environments.

Essential Skills:
J2EEWebADF applications using any combination of WebLogic, JBoss, WebSphere or Tomcat application servers.
o 4-5 years of experience in using Oracle ADF 12c is mandatory
o Strong experience with the following tools Oracle JDeveloper, Oracle SOA, Oracle BPEL
o Strong experience with Oracle PLSQL, SQL, distributed technologies, Frameworks and Application servers
o Analyzing production incidents and identify root cause of issues
o Handling production call for application issues
o Implementing code fixes for enhancements and production issues in Oracle ADF 12c using JDeveloper
o Meeting with Client business analyst to understand requirements
o Strong verbal, written and interpersonal communication skills
o Identifies areas for process improvement.
o Explaining the requirements, functionality, design framework to onsite offshore team members
o Provides management with timely communication on status Utilizes appropriate tools and/or develops custom solutions as required to meet objectives.
o Support the solution through deployment and operations
o Strong analytical ability
o Ability to work with all teams and understand code changes and review business requirements and identify any gaps, Project Code :

Strong regression testing, performance benchmarking, production support, and UAT bug-fix experience for mission-critical HR or financial applications in hybrid work environments.
---
Top 5 Don’t-Have / Not Suitable For

1. No Pure Support or Maintenance Profiles
Candidates with only L1/L2 production support experience and no hands-on upgrade/migration development work.

2. No Junior-Level ADF Developers
Candidates without real enterprise-scale Oracle ADF/WebLogic migration experience or exposure to large integrated systems.

3. No Candidates Limited to Legacy Java Versions Only
Candidates who have worked only on Java 6/7/8 maintenance projects without Java 17/21 modernization exposure.

4. No Remote-Only Candidates
Must be comfortable working in hybrid mode and coming to office at least twice a week.

5. No Candidates Without Integration Troubleshooting Experience
Candidates lacking experience in REST/SOAP/SFTP integrations, dependency remediation, SSL/TLS handling, or middleware troubleshooting in enterprise environments.

Essential Skills:
J2EEWebADF applications using any combination of WebLogic, JBoss, WebSphere or Tomcat application servers.
o 4-5 years of experience in using Oracle ADF 12c is mandatory
o Strong experience with the following tools Oracle JDeveloper, Oracle SOA, Oracle BPEL
o Strong experience with Oracle PLSQL, SQL, distributed technologies, Frameworks and Application servers
o Analyzing production incidents and identify root cause of issues
o Handling production call for application issues
o Implementing code fixes for enhancements and production issues in Oracle ADF 12c using JDeveloper
o Meeting with Client business analyst to understand requirements
o Strong verbal, written and interpersonal communication skills
o Identifies areas for process improvement.
o Explaining the requirements, functionality, design framework to onsite offshore team members
o Provides management with timely communication on status Utilizes appropriate tools and/or develops custom solutions as required to meet objectives.
o Support the solution through deployment and operations
o Strong analytical ability
o Ability to work with all teams and understand code changes and review business requirements and identify any gaps, Project Code :

data.public_job_desc:
Bill Rate: MAX CONFIRMED $65 to $70
Location: ONSITE- Phoenix AZ
Duration: 6 months

Role: Agile Coach

Descriptions:

"The Agile Coach is a cornerstone role in building and shaping a new Agile Center of Excellence from the ground up. This is a rare opportunity to help define how Agile comes to life across IT, working alongside teams as they take their very first steps on their Agile journey and experience the power of great execution.
Rather than operating from the sidelines, this role embeds directly with delivery teams to make Agile real. The Agile Coach brings sprint ceremonies to life, strengthens delivery discipline, and partners closely with product owners, scrum leads, engineers, and IT leaders to drive meaningful progress. Through hands on coaching, the role removes blockers, addresses Agile anti patterns, and builds strong, resilient team dynamics in real time.
This position is ideal for someone who thrives in the early stages of transformation, and is excited to influence mindsets, establish working norms, and help teams achieve their first wins while navigating early challenges. The Agile Coach will have a visible and lasting impact by setting the foundation for consistent delivery, scalable practices, and a shared understanding of what “great Agile” truly looks like, starting from day one.
• Responsibilities
o Provide hands-on Agile coaching by embedding with delivery teams and leaders to strengthen execution, reinforce effective Agile practices, and improve delivery outcomes.

o Coach teams, Product Owners, and Scrum Leads to improve flow, clarify roles, maintain healthy backlogs, and consistently deliver usable working outcomes.

o Identify and address delivery blockers, Agile anti-patterns, and team or leadership behaviors that negatively impact predictability and throughput.

o Support Agile adoption efforts by coaching teams and leaders through onboarding, launch, and stabilization phases, and helping the organization transition to Agile ways of working.

o Reinforce consistent use of Agile tools and practices to ensure work remains visible, current, and aligned to agreed execution standards, enabling reliable insights and data driven improvement.

o Partner with the Agile Center of Excellence to share lessons learned, support lightweight standards and training, and continuously improve Agile enablement approaches across IT.

• Qualifications
o 8+ years of related experience in Project Management or similar field.
o Bachelor's degree in related field required.
o Previous leadership experience preferred.
o Intermediate knowledge of general Financial Services or Banking is preferred.
o Intermediate knowledge of applicable regulatory and legal compliance obligations, rules and regulations, industry standards and practices.
o Intermediate to advanced experience in IT project management managing large, complex projects with a proven track record of delivering projects on time, within budget, and to quality standards.
o Advanced experience working with project management tools (e.g., Workfront, MS Project, or similar).
o Strong understanding of IT systems, software development life cycles (SDLC), and cloud technologies while also demonstrating strong organizational and interpersonal skills with the ability to build relationships with team members, stakeholders, and external partners.
o Advanced speaking and writing communication skills.
o Project Management Professional Certification, Certified Scrum Master (CSM), Professional Scrum Master (PSM), or equivalent certification
o May require up to 25% travel.", Project Code :

Bill Rate: MAX CONFIRMED $55 - $60
Location: ONSITE- Chicago, IL/ remote
Duration: 6 months

Role: Sr. Server Admin Engineer

Descriptions:

We are seeking a highly skilled and experienced Senior Systems & Server Admin migration engineer to join our dynamic IT M&A Team. The candidate will be part of a larger team but will be expected to work on their own on most projects. The core responsibilities will be to ensure ownership and successful execution of complex data migrations. The candidate should be proficient in using, creating and fault finding Robocopy scripts and Excel formulas. The process will be owned from end to end, start with due diligence, then discovery and planning through to execution and post migration support.



· Publishing support documentation to assist IT colleagues in following defined IT processes.

· Ensure regular and clear updates are provided to the Systems Operations Manager and global operational teams.

· Providing technical solutions for BAU and project-based requests, producing high level overviews and explanations as required.

· Comfortable leading technical project meetings, ability to communicate effectively with nontechnical staff.

· Provide support, administration and implementations across Production and test environments and an understanding of how applications interact with these systems.

Azure fundamentals
RClone
Robocopy
Scripting experience
On-premise datacentres/hardware
VMWare
Deep understanding of Active directory/Group policy
Unstructured data migrations
Excel Formulas.
Deep understanding of Robocopy and Batch Files
File server management
Azure AD/Entra ID
Deep understanding Windows share and NTFS Permissions
SFTP Protocol
Experience with copying/moving large data sets.   
Experience with PowerShell scripting. 
Basic understanding of VPN concepts. Ability to work with Network teams to gain access to remote systems. ·        
Experience working with SAAS file sharing products, i.e. Dropbox, ShareFile etc. ·        
Ability to troubleshoot and remediate user access issues and other complex related issues
Excellent communication skills.

Experience Required: 6-8, Project Code :

**Please strictly adhere to the following resume naming convention:
ALL CAPS, NO SPACES B/T UNDERSCORES

Bill Rate $60 - $65

PTN_US_GBAMSREQID_CANDIDATEBEELINEID
i.e. PTN_US_9999999_SKIPJOHNSON0413

MSP Owner: Zach Provence
Location: Schaumburg IL
Duration: 6 months
GBaMS ReqID: 10706365


Role Descriptions: This role is part of our engineering organization and is responsible for translating business requirements into clear, actionable technical specifications. The integration Analyst serves as a liaison between business and technical teams, helping to simplify complex business needs into well-defined technical requirements.

As an Integration Analyst, you will be part of a Scrum team, working closely with product managers, developers, and other technology and business stakeholders. You will leverage your analytical and technical expertise to drive effective solutions.

A key responsibility of the role is to create and maintain integration mapping documentation, including HL7 and other data formats, defining accurate mappings between source and destination systems.

• Gather and analyze requirements for integrations between internal applications and external partner systems.
• Interpret and work with HL7 (v2.x, v3), FHIR, XML and other data/message structures.
• Create and maintain source-to-target data mapping documentation.
• Analyze source and target system data structures to identify gaps, inconsistencies, and data quality issues
• Define transformation logic, field mappings and data rules.
• Collaborate with technical teams implementing the interfaces and transformations .
• Collaborate with the product manager, business and development teams to define user stories, acceptance criteria, and sprint goals.
• Participate in daily stand-ups, sprint reviews, and retrospectives to share progress, discuss challenges, and identify opportunities for optimization.
• Collaborate with QA analysts to validate data integrity and troubleshoot any issues related to tracking implementation or data discrepancies.
• Act as a subject matter expert in Quest HL7 standards and integration best practices.

Required skills:
• 5+ years of experience as an integration analyst, healthcare data analyst or similar role
• 3+ years of hands-on experience working with HL7 (v2.x, v3) message structures and standards (ADT, ORU, ORM etc)
• Hands-on experience with data mapping and transformations rules
• Strong understanding of healthcare workflows (especially patient registration, orders, results, billing workflows and message formats)
• Experience working with data formats such as HL7, XML, JSON, FHIR etc
• 2+ years of experience working in Agile/Scrum environment
• Experience with Jira for managing stories and backlog
• Experience writing user stories and acceptance criteria
• Ability to closely work with businesses, product managers and developers to prioritize backlog items
• Ability to manage multiple priorities in a fast-paced environment.

Physical and Mental Requirements:
Proven ability to sift through data, identify critical information, analyze, and make recommendations that influence successful product outcomes
Self-driven, highly motivated individual


Bachelor's degree in Science, Business, Computer Science, or a related field

Keyword:
Skills: Java XML Technologies (XML| XSL| FO| JAXP| JAXB)
Experience Required: 10 & Above, Project Code :

data.public_job_desc:
Please strictly adhere to the following resume naming convention:
ALL CAPS, NO SPACES B/T UNDERSCORES

Bill Rate: $80- $90/hr MAX

PTN_US_GBAMSREQID_CandidateBeelineID
i.e. PTN_US_9999999_SKIPJOHNSON0413

MSP Owner: Shilpa Bajpai
Location: Culver City, CA (Onsite - Locals preferred)- 100% ONSITE FEOM DAY 1
Duration: 6 months
GBaMS ReqID:10769084
___________________________________________________________________________

Role: Data Center/Cloud & Automation SME
Experience Required: 10 & Above


Skills: Digital : Amazon Web Service(AWS) Cloud Computing
• Primary Skills : Linux, AWS, Terraform & Ansible, Automation
• Secondary Skills : Windows, Citrix, Nutanix and VMware


Detailed Responsibility**
• Manage and support Linux servers including installation, patching, user management, performance monitoring, and troubleshooting.
• Design, provision, and maintain AWS infrastructure (EC2, Certificate Manager, Security Groups, VPC, IAM, S3, Load Balancers) ensuring security, availability, and cost efficiency.
• Implement Infrastructure as Code using Terraform to build, update, and manage AWS resources in a consistent and reusable manner.
• Automate system configuration, deployments, and patching using Ansible playbooks and roles.
• Code version control through Github.
• Monitor systems and cloud resources, respond to incidents, and perform root cause analysis.
• Follow security best practices, access controls, and compliance requirements across OS and cloud platforms.
• Collaborate with application, network, and security teams to support deployments and changes.
• Maintain documentation, SOPs, and continuously improve automation and operational efficiency.

Required Technical Skill Set** • Linux Administration: Strong hands on experience with RHEL / Amazon Linux / Ubuntu, including user management, patching, troubleshooting, shell scripting, and performance monitoring.
• AWS Cloud: Practical knowledge of core AWS services such as EC2, VPC, Subnets, Certificate Manager,IAM, S3, Load Balancers, Auto Scaling, and CloudWatch, with security and cost optimization awareness.
• Infrastructure as Code (Terraform): Experience in writing and managing Terraform modules, variables, and state files to provision and maintain AWS infrastructure.
• Configuration Management (Ansible): Ability to create and manage Ansible playbooks and roles for OS configuration, automation, and deployment tasks.
• Version Control: Working knowledge of Git for code versioning and collaboration.
• Understanding of networking fundamentals
• Automation & Scripting: Proficiency in Bash scripting and automation of repetitive operational tasks.
• Monitoring & Troubleshooting: Experience in system and cloud monitoring, incident handling, and root cause analysis.
• Security & Compliance: Understanding of access control, encryption, patch management, and secure configuration practices.

Good-to-Have-

• Windows Adminitration, Citrix - storefront, Delivery controllers, netscaler, PAM, XenApp Administration.
• Experience in Nutanix and VMware
• CI/CD Tools: Exposure to Jenkins, GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, or similar pipelines.
• Containers & Orchestration: Basic knowledge of Docker and Kubernetes.
• Advanced AWS Services: Familiarity with RDS, Lambda, DynamoDB, Route53, or EKS.
• Monitoring & Logging Tools: Experience with tools like Prometheus, Grafana, ELK stack, or CloudTrail.
• Ansible AWX / Tower: Experience with Ansible Tower or AWX for centralized automation.
• Terraform Advanced Usage: Exposure to multi account setups, workspaces, and complex module design.
• Security Practices: Knowledge of vulnerability scanning, security audits, and compliance requirements.
• ITIL / ITSM Awareness: Experience working with incident, problem, and change management processes.
• Scripting Languages: Basic knowledge of Python for automation tasks.
• Documentation & Knowledge Sharing: Ability to create SOPs, runbooks, and technical documentation.

Responsibility of Automation & Configuration Management Engineer / Expectations from the Role
1 Manage and support Linux servers, including installation, patching, monitoring, and troubleshooting.
2 Provision, configure, and maintain AWS infrastructure ensuring availability, security, and scalability.
3 Develop and maintain Infrastructure as Code using Terraform for consistent cloud deployments.
4 Automate system configuration, deployments, and operational tasks using Ansible.
5 Monitor systems and cloud resources; handle incidents, changes, and service requests.
6 Perform root cause analysis and implement preventive actions
7 Enforce security best practices across OS and cloud environments.
8 Collaborate with cross functional teams to support application deployments and platform stability.
9 Maintain documentation, SOPs, and runbooks
10 Manage code/version control through GitHub
Continuously improve automation, reliability, and operational efficiency., Project Code :

data.public_job_desc:
LOCAL to Jacksonville, Florida ONLY!

JD: We need candidates with exp.range of 3-4 yrs.

Must Have Technical/Functional Skills
.
• Experience managing and analyzing data from multiple sources
• Strong customer service and communication skills
• Experience with case management systems and handling HR inquiries
• Proficiency utilizing HRIS systems (ADP Workforce Now) and Excel for reporting and analytics
Roles & Responsibilities
1. Benefits & Retirement Plan Administration
• Monitor weekly feeds, maintain documentation, and resolve discrepancies with benefit vendors and ADP.
• Perform quarterly reconciliations for Benefits enrollment and payroll, including documentation and issue resolution.
• Prepare census reports and manage periodic data requests.
• Compile and validate files for annual non-discrimination testing for 401(k), HSA, and FSA plans.
• Support annual Department of Labor (Form 5500) reporting.
• Prepare, organize, and manage documentation for annual 401(k) audit requirements.

2. HR Shared Services & Tier 1 Support
• Serve as the primary point of contact for Tier 1 HR support, addressing a wide range of associate inquiries across core HR functions, processes, and policies.
• Provide accurate, timely responses to HR questions using the Deskpro case management system.
• Collaborate with HR leaders to escalate and resolve complex or specialized issues.
• Perform data validations and support resolution of system or process issues.
• Review and approve job descriptions for alignment with Job Architecture standards.
3. HRIS, Data Integrity & System Enhancements
• Partner with IT and HRIS teams on data validation, system testing, enhancements, and troubleshooting.
• Configure and maintain HRIS modules, system tables, workflows, and business processes.
• Conduct periodic reviews of system access and security controls for HR vendors to maintain compliance and safeguard associate information.
• Perform quarterly validation of new states for Workers’ Compensation compliance.
4. Reporting, Analytics & Compliance
• Produce and maintain clear, accurate HR reports, dashboards, and tracking tools using analytical software such as Excel, Power BI, or Tableau to support data driven decision making.
• Deliver ad hoc reporting and analytics to support issue resolution, leadership requests, and first paycheck-of-year audits.
• Respond to ad hoc reporting requests across HR functions.
• Generate quarterly Rewards & Recognition (R&R) reports for leadership and monthly reports for the Associate Experience team.


Role Descriptions: Deliver accuracy and productivity as informed to meet the overall goals of the business.
Essential Skills: Insurance| Retirement| HRO Operations
Desirable Skills:
Keyword:
Skills: Insurance - Retirement Services - USA
Experience Required:, Project Code :

data.public_job_desc:
ALL CAPS, NO SPACES B/T UNDERSCORES PTN_US_GBAMSREQID_
Candidate BeelineID i.e. PTN_US_9999999_SKIPJOHNSON0413
MSP Owner: Thomas Hodges
Targeted Bill Rate- $55hr
REQUIREMENT_CITY - Clinton, NJ
REQUIREMENT_ID-10672058
Role Name - Oracle/SQL Database Technical Lead
EXPERIENCE_RANGE_IN_REQUIRED_SKILLS_ Core Database Administration; Backup, Recovery & High Availability & DR (RAC, Data guard, ACFS); Performance Tuning & Monitoring; Cloud & Modern Platforms; Cross-Functional & Application Support

ROLE_DESCRIPTION -

Technical Skills Database Administration:
• Install, build, and configure Oracle server software and related products.
• Maintenance, Patching and Upgrade of oracle databases.
• Ensure high availability and disaster recovery solutions, such as RAC, Data Guard, ACFS.
• Configure and manage backups for database using RMAN and Cohesity
• Perform RMAN and logical(data pump) backup and restore
• Provision, configure and manage database clones for in Cohesity
• Interact with Oracle Corporation for technical support when necessary
• Setup and maintain documentation and standards i.e. SOP's
Performance Tuning and Optimization:
• Monitor database performance and identify bottlenecks.
• Optimize queries, indexes, and database configurations.
• Analyze and improve database storage and I/O performance.
Backup and Recovery:
• Implement and manage database backup and recovery strategies using RMAN, datapump and Cohesity
• Conduct regular backups and test restore processes to ensure data integrity.

Security and Compliance:
• Manage user access, roles and permissions.
• Ensure databases comply with security standards and regulations (e.g., GDPR, HIPAA).
• Perform audit duties like Unified auditing and apply security patches.
Monitoring and Troubleshooting:
• Use monitoring tools to track database health, performance, and capacity.
• Diagnose and resolve database errors and performance issues.
• Maintain and manage DPA and dashboards like OEM, SolarWinds, New Relic.
Collaboration and Support:
• Work closely with application developers to support database requirements.
• Provide technical support for oracle databases.
• Provide 24/7 and on-call rotations for after-hours support.
AWS cloud support:
• Install, build, and configure Oracle server software and related products in EC2 instance using terraform
• Perform migration of database from on-premises to AWS cloud.
Documentation and Reporting:
• Maintain accurate documentation for database configurations, procedures, and changes.
• Generate reports on database performance, capacity, and usage.
Delphix
• Installation, configuration, and upgrade of Delphix engine
• Creating and managing dSource; Creating and managing VDBs
• Configuring and maintaining Delphix Environments
• Performing VDB refresh upon requests and configuring daily/weekly refresh
• Monitoring and fixing alerts in the delphix
• Delphix engine Space management
• User and data management in VDBs using pre/post refresh scripts
• Engage with Delphix corporation for technical support when necessary



Skills: IT IS_AMS_Oracle Database Administration~IT IS_AMS_Database_MS SQL Server
Experience Required: 8-10, Project Code :

LOCAL TO Cary, NC/ New York ONLY!

Job Description
Role Overview
The AEM Author is responsible for creating, editing, managing, and publishing digital content using Adobe Experience Manager (AEM). This role ensures content accuracy, consistency, and alignment with brand standards while delivering an optimal user experience across digital platforms.
________________________________________
Key Responsibilities
• Create, edit, update, and publish web content using Adobe Experience Manager (AEM)
• Manage pages, components, templates, and digital assets (AEM Assets / DAM)
• Follow content workflows for review, approval, scheduling, and version control
• Ensure content complies with brand guidelines, accessibility standards, and quality requirements
• Collaborate with design, development, marketing, and business stakeholders
• Perform routine content maintenance, updates, and issue resolution
• Support multilingual and localized content publishing

  • SSIS

data.public_job_desc:
Job Title: Software Engineer – Backend Development: 26-00250
Requirement #: 26-00250
Location: Fremont-CA

Job Description:
Primary Skills: JavaScript (Expert), Go (Advanced), Python (Intermediate), ASP.NET (Expert), REST APIs (Advanced).
Contract Type:  W2/C2C 
Duration:  6+ Months
Location: Fremont, CA. 

Job Summary:

We are seeking a highly skilled Software Engineer to join our team in Fremont, CA. This role requires a committed individual ready to work onsite, who thrives in a fast-paced environment and is eager to contribute to the development of high-quality, scalable web applications. The ideal candidate should have a passion for backend development, a solid understanding of web application architecture, and a desire to work collaboratively in achieving excellence.

Key Responsibilities:
  • Implement robust backend functionalities using JavaScript, Go, and Python within an ASP.NET and FastAPI framework environment.
  • Design and develop RESTful APIs, microservices, and efficiently manage database operations using MySQL and Redis.
  • Work closely with the development team to create scalable microservices architecture and contribute to all phases of the development lifecycle.
  • Participate in agile development processes, ensuring application performance and responsiveness to requests from the front end.
  • Collaborate with cross-functional teams to integrate user-facing elements with server-side logic and functionality.

Must-Have Skills:
  • Proven experience in backend development with a focus on JavaScript, Go, and Python.
  • Strong knowledge of ASP.NET, FastAPI, REST APIs, and microservices architecture.
  • Experience with database management using MySQL and Redis.

Industry Experience:
Solid experience in web application development and architecture. Experience in building enterprise-scale applications and working within small to medium development teams is highly beneficial.

Position: Scrum Master
Rate: $45/hr on C2C
ClientL Homebase Homecare
Location: Remote (CST time zone)

Required Skills & Experience:

  • Strong hands-on experience with Scrum and Kanban methodologies.
  • Good understanding of Cybersecurity-related projects and environments.
  • Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills.
  • Experience managing and facilitating Agile processes for two full development teams, including QA teams.
  • Proven experience working in large-scale enterprise environments.
  • Experience with Azure DevOps (ADO) for Agile planning, tracking, and reporting.
  • Ability to effectively manage and coordinate remote and near-shore teams.

Preferred Qualifications:

  • Experience with Scaled Agile Framework (SAFe) is a strong plus.
  • Experience working with distributed teams across multiple locations and time zones.

Key Responsibilities:

  • Facilitate Scrum ceremonies and Agile best practices.
  • Support delivery teams in achieving sprint and release objectives.
  • Remove impediments and drive continuous improvement initiatives.
  • Collaborate with product owners, development teams, QA teams, and stakeholders.
  • Ensure Agile processes are followed while maintaining team productivity and alignment.
